title: Word of the Day: film crew 攝影團隊
desc:
彰化縣溪州鄉成功國小西畔分校
The students show their best talents to the film crew. 
學生們向攝影團隊展現他們最好的才華。
The students work together with the film crew to capture school life. 
學生們與攝影團隊通力合作，以捕捉校園生活的精彩畫面。

title: Word of the Day: sentence 句子
desc:
彰化縣溪州鄉成功國小西畔分校
The students chat with the foreign teacher to practice the weekly sentence.  學生們透過與外籍老師交談，來練習「每週一句」。
The students chat to learn more words in every sentence. 
學生們透過交談，從每個句子中認識更多單字。

title: Word of the Day: singing contest 歌唱比賽
desc:
彰化縣溪州鄉成功國小西畔分校
The students stand on the stage to sing beautiful songs to win the singing contest. 
學生們站在舞台上，唱著動聽的歌，希望能贏得這場歌唱比賽。
They are brave on the stage in front of the judges during the singing contest. 
在歌唱比賽期間，他們在評審面前的舞台上表現得非常勇敢。

title: Word of the Day: experience 體驗
desc:
彰化縣員林市青山國小
The students use wooden molds to experience the process of making Red Turtle Cakes. 
學生們使用木模，來體驗製作紅龜粿的過程。
This activity is a great way to experience the traditional culture and history. 
這活動體驗傳統文化與歷史的絕佳方式。

title: Word of the Day: field trip 校外教學
desc:
彰化縣員林市青山國小
The students go on a field trip. 學生們去校外教學。
They observed many new things during their field trip. 
他們在校外教學觀察到許多新事物。

title: Word of the Day: craft 手工藝品
desc:
彰化縣溪州鄉溪州國小
The students made many beautiful New Year crafts at the winter art camp.  學生們在寒假藝術營做了許多漂亮的春節手工藝品。
The students used their imagination to create special and fun crafts.  
學生們發揮想像力，創作了既特別又有趣的手工藝品。

title: Word of the Day: jump rope 跳繩
desc:
彰化縣芳苑鄉後寮國小
Jump rope is a good way to stay active and healthy. 
跳繩是保持活躍和健康的好方法。
The students enjoy playing jump rope at recess. 
課間休息時，學生喜歡玩跳繩。

title: Word of the Day: soccer 足球
desc:
彰化縣芳苑鄉後寮國小
The students are working on their soccer skills on the field. 
學生們正在球場上練習足球技巧。
They are learning to control the soccer ball with their feet.  
他們正在學習用腳控制足球。

title: Word of the Day: school flag 校旗
desc:
彰化縣彰化市中山國小
The students are practicing carrying the school flag for Sports Day. 
學生們正在為校慶練習會旗進場。
The school flag stands for teamwork and sportsmanship. 
校旗代表著團隊合作與運動家精神。

title: Word of the Day: indigo dyeing 藍染
desc:
彰化縣溪州鄉溪州國小
The students are practicing indigo dyeing to make beautiful patterns.  
學生們正在練習藍染，來製作漂亮的圖案。
The students are soaking the cloth for indigo dyeing.  
學生們正在為了藍染而浸泡布料。

title: Word of the Day: SEL 社會情緒學習
desc:
彰化縣溪州鄉溪州國小
The students learn about emotions at the SEL book exhibition.  
學生們在 SEL 主題書展學習關於情緒的知識。
They use iPads and worksheets to explore SEL.  
他們使用平板電腦和學習單來探索 SEL。

title: Word of the Day: homework 家庭作業
desc:
彰化縣大城鄉西港國小
The students are quietly doing their homework in the classroom. 
學生們正在教室裡安靜地做作業。
The homework helps them review what they have learned in class. 
作業幫助他們複習在課堂上學到的知識。

title: Word of the Day: shoot 投籃
desc:
彰化縣大城鄉西港國小
The students are practicing shooting the basketball. 學生正在練習投籃。
They take turns shooting the ball.  他們輪流投籃。

title: Word of the Day: Push Hands 推手
desc:
彰化縣大城鄉西港國小
The students are practicing "Push Hands" to learn balance.  
學生們正在練習「推手」來學習平衡。
The teacher shows them how to stay steady in "Push Hands" class.  
老師在「推手」課上教他們如何保持穩固。

title: Word of the Day: bubble 泡泡
desc:
彰化縣田尾鄉仁豐國小
The students are making bubbles using different tools.  學生們正在使用許多不同的工具製作泡泡。
They learn that making bubbles always creates round shapes.  他們學到製作泡泡總是會產生圓形的形狀。

title: Word of the Day: Song Jiang Battle Array 宋江陣
desc:
彰化縣田尾鄉仁豐國小
The students are practicing Song Jiang Battle Array together.  學生們正在一起練習宋江陣。
Song Jiang Battle Array needs great teamwork and skills.  宋江陣需要強大的團隊默契與技巧。

title: Word of the Day: law 法律
desc:
彰化縣員林市饒明國小
The students are learning about the law. 學生們正在學習關於法律的知識。
This lesson teaches them basic law knowledge. 這堂課教導他們基本的法治常識。

title: Word of the Day: throw 丟、扔
desc:
彰化縣員林市饒明國小
The students are practicing throwing the ball far away.  
學生們正在練習把球丟遠。
They take turns throwing the ball on the running track.  
他們在跑道上輪流丟球。

title: Word of the Day: Halo halo 菲律賓冰品
desc:
彰化縣北斗鎮萬來國小
The students are making the famous Filipino dessert, Halo-halo. 
學生們正在製作著名的菲律賓甜點：Halo-halo。
They are mixing various ingredients, such as fruits and crushed ice, to make their own Halo-halo. 
他們正在混合各種配料，像是水果和碎冰，來製作自己的Halo-halo甜點。

title: Word of the Day: Zentangle 禪繞畫
desc:
彰化縣彰化市大竹國小
The students are enjoying a fun Zentangle art class. 
學生們正在享受一堂有趣的禪繞畫藝術課。
They use simple lines and patterns in their Zentangle art to feel calm and relax. 
他們在禪繞畫藝術中使用簡單的線條和圖案，讓自己感到平靜和放鬆。

title: Word of the Day: square meter 平方公尺
desc:
彰化縣彰化市大竹國小
Students make a one square meter template in math class.  
學生們在數學課上製作一個一平方公尺的模板。
They use the template to measure things and understand the square meter. 他們使用模板來測量東西並了解平方公尺。

title: Word of the Day: sports equipment 體育器材
desc:
彰化縣彰化市大竹國小
Students sometimes need to check out sports equipment for their physical education (PE) class. 
學生們有時需要借用體育課器材（PE equipment）來上他們的體育課。
They must sign the register to borrow the sports equipment and sign them back in after class. 
他們必須簽名登記才能借用體育器材（PE equipment），並在下課後簽名歸還。

title: Word of the Day: cyanotype 藍曬
desc:
彰化縣彰化市大竹國小
The students are doing a hands-on cyanotype art project.  
學生們正在做一個動手操作的藍曬藝術專案。
They are following steps to make a cyanotype print.  
他們正在按照步驟製作一張藍曬版畫/照片。

title: Word of the Day: exhibit 展覽
desc:
彰化縣田中鎮三潭國小
The students are looking closely at the exhibits to learn about the 'Made in Changhua' spirit. 
學生們正在仔細觀看展品，以學習「彰化製造」的精神。
They are listening to the guide for the different high-tech and traditional exhibits. 
他們聽導覽員說明各種高科技和傳統展品。

title: Word of the Day: vaccine 疫苗
desc:
彰化縣田中鎮三潭國小
Many healthcare workers came to the school to give students their vaccines. 許多醫護人員來到學校為學生接種疫苗。
The students are waiting to get the flu vaccines. 
學生們正在等待接種流感疫苗。

title: Word of the Day: charity sale 義賣
desc:
彰化縣溪州鄉成功國小暨西畔分校
The sixth-grade students held a charity sale to raise money for their graduation trip. 
六年級的學生們舉辦了一場慈善義賣，為畢業旅行籌集資金。
They sold drinks and desserts to customers at their booth during the charity sale. 
在義賣期間，他們在自己的攤位上向顧客出售飲料和甜點。

title: Word of the Day: jump rope competition 跳繩比賽
desc:
彰化縣溪州鄉成功國小暨西畔分校
The students participate in a jump rope competition. 
學生們參加跳繩比賽。
Many students participate in the jump rope competition. 
許多學生參加跳繩比賽。

title: Word of the Day: meeting 會議
desc:
彰化縣溪州鄉成功國小暨西畔分校
Teachers and parents attend the Class Parent-Teacher Meeting for the new semester. 
老師和家長們參加了新學期的班級親師座談會。
During the meeting, the parents are learning about the curriculum of the school. 
在會議期間，家長們了解學校的課程。

title: Word of the Day: SH150 program SH150方案
desc:
彰化縣溪州鄉成功國小暨西畔分校
Students are participating in the SH150 program by doing daily stretches and running.  
學生們正在進行日常伸展和跑步來參與 SH150 方案。)
The goal of SH150 program is to promote regular exercise and better fitness for students.  
SH150 的目標是促進學生的規律運動和更好的體適能。

title: Word of the Day: swimming class 游泳課
desc:
彰化縣溪州鄉成功國小暨西畔分校
The students learn how to swim in swimming class.
They learn the basics of swimming in swimming class.
同學們在游泳課時學習如何游泳。
他們在游泳課時學習游泳的基本動作。

title: Word of the Day: virtual reality 虛擬實境
desc:
彰化縣彰化市中山國小
The students are doing virtual reality. 
學生們正在做虛擬實境。
They use headsets and controls to do virtual reality. 
他們使用耳機和控制來實現虛擬實境。

title: Word of the Day: tea culture 茶文化
desc:
彰化縣彰化市中山國小
In tea culture, the host prepares tea for the guests. 
在茶文化中，主人為客人泡茶。
Tea culture is very important in Taiwan. 
茶文化在台灣非常重要。

title: Word of the Day: bubble painting 泡泡水彩畫
desc:
彰化縣溪州鄉溪州國小
The students are doing a fun art activity called bubble painting. 
學生們正在進行一項有趣的藝術活動，叫做吹泡泡水彩畫。
They mix soap and watercolor to create unique patterns with their bubble painting. 
他們混合了肥皂和水彩，用他們的吹泡泡水彩畫來創造獨特的圖案。

desc:
彰化縣溪州鄉溪州國小
In the agriculture class, students loosen the soil and mix in fertilizer. 
在農業課上，學生鬆土、施肥。
They learn basic farming skills by working together outdoors during the agriculture class. 
他們在農業課上一起在戶外工作，學習基本的農耕技能。

desc:
彰化縣花壇鄉文祥國小
The students are learning about Vietnamese culture and language in a fun summer camp. 
學生們正在一個有趣的夏令營中學習越南文化和語言。
They are taking part in hands-on activities to understand Vietnamese customs. 
他們正在參與動手做的活動來了解越南風俗。

desc:
彰化縣花壇鄉文祥國小
The students practice performing a tea ceremony. 
同學們在練習茶道。
You have to pay attention to details during a tea ceremony. 
進行茶道時，你必須注意細節。

desc:
彰化縣花壇鄉文祥國小
The students are making rice balls as part of a fun rice ball activity with the Farmers' Association. 
學生們正在與農會合作，進行一場有趣的飯糰活動，製作飯糰。

他們正在這個飯糰活動中，用手將米飯和蔬菜塑形。

title: Word of the Day: field trip 校外教學1
desc:
彰化縣彰化市大竹國小
The students are on a field trip in Lukang, where a tour guide is telling them about the historical sites 
學生們正在鹿港校外教學，一位導覽員正向他們介紹古蹟。
They are also taking part in a hands-on activity, making traditional crafts and learning about local culture. 
他們也正在參與一項動手做的活動，製作傳統工藝品並學習當地文化。

title: Word of the Day: meeting 會議
desc:
彰化縣北斗鎮萬來國小
Teachers and parents attend the Class Parent-Teacher Meeting for the new semester. 
老師和家長們參加了新學期的班級親師座談會。
During the meeting, the parents are learning about the curriculum of the school. 
在會議期間，家長們了解學校的課程。

title: Word of the Day: makeup 化妝
desc:
彰化縣員林市育英國小

A makeup artist is helping the students put on makeup to make their faces stand out on stage. 
一位化妝師正在幫助學生們化妝，讓他們的臉在舞台上更突出。

title: Word of the Day: card 卡片

彰化縣員林市育英國小
The students are making Mother's Day cards with pop-up designs and sparkles.

他們正在使用不同的美術材料，為他們的媽媽製作美麗且獨一無二的卡片。

title: Word of the Day: video 影片
desc:
彰化縣北斗鎮萬來國小
The students are preparing for an English speaking contest by using video resources. 
學生們正在利用影片資源，為一場英語朗讀比賽做準備。
They are practicing their pronunciation and fluency by listening and speaking along with the videos. 
他們正在透過聽取影片並跟著說，來練習他們的發音和流暢度。

desc:
彰化縣北斗鎮萬來國小
Midterm exams are exams given around the midpoint of a grading term, such as a quarter or semester. 
期中考是一個期中的考試，有可能學季制或是學期制。
Students spend a lot of time and effort preparing for their midterm exams. 同學們花很多時間與精力準備期中考。

title: Word of the Day: badminton 羽球
desc:
彰化縣北斗鎮萬來國小
These students are learning to play badminton. 
、學生們正在學習打羽毛球。
Badminton can be a single or team sport. 
羽毛球可以是單人運動，也可以是團隊運動。

title: Word of the Day: computer class 電腦課
desc:
彰化縣北斗鎮萬來國小
The students learn how to use computers in computer class. 
同學們在電腦課中學習如何使用電腦。

每個學生在電腦課的時候都有一台電腦可以使用。

title: Word of the Day: mural 壁畫
desc:
彰化縣北斗鎮萬來國小
The students are working together to paint a colorful school mural on the wall. 
學生們正在合作在牆上繪製一幅色彩豐富的學校壁畫。
They are using paint and brushes to decorate the campus with this large school mural. 
他們正在使用顏料和畫筆，用這幅大型的學校壁畫來美化校園。

title: Word of the Day: Chinese class 國語課
desc:
彰化縣溪州鄉水尾國小
The students are in Chinese class.  
同學們正在上國語課。
They learn Chinese idioms in Chinese class.  
他們在國語課學習中文的成語、詞語。

title: Word of the Day: plant 種植
desc:
彰化縣溪州鄉水尾國小
The students are learning how to plant scallions.  
學生們正在學習如何種植蔥。 
They dig the soil, plant the seedlings, and water them to help them grow. 他們挖土、種下蔥苗，並為它們澆水，好讓它們成長。

title: Word of the Day: game 遊戲
desc:
彰化縣溪州鄉成功國小西畔分校
The teacher uses a game to make English class fun and engaging. 
老師用遊戲讓英語課變得有趣和吸引人。
Games in class keep students focused and interested. 
課堂上的遊戲可以保持學生的注意力和興趣。

title: Word of the Day: Hakka 客家語
desc:
彰化縣溪州鄉成功國小西畔分校
The school has added the Hakka language to its curriculum. 
學校已將客語納入校訂課程中。
The students learn Hakka proverbs and a new sentence at the Tuesday morning assembly. 
學生們在每週二的朝會上，會學習一句新的客語和客家諺語。

title: Word of the Day: mobile library 行動圖書館
desc:
彰化縣彰化市大竹國小
The mobile library is a truck that's been converted into a small library. 
行動圖書館是由卡車改裝的小圖書館。
The mobile library can bring lots of books to students at different schools! 行動圖書館可以將書帶給不同學校的學生閱讀。

title: Word of the Day :calligraphy 書法
desc:
彰化縣彰化市大竹國小
The boys and girls are learning traditional Chinese calligraphy. 
這群男孩和女孩正在學習中國傳統的書法。
To get good at calligraphy, you have to have a lot of patience! 
書法要寫得好必須要很有耐心。

title: Word of the Day: celebrate 慶祝
desc:
彰化縣彰化市大竹國小
The students are celebrating their classmate's birthday. 
學生們慶祝他們同班同學的生日。
They are having a good time celebrating his birthday. 
他們在慶祝他的生日時非常開心。

title: Word of the Day: newspaper 報紙
desc:
彰化縣彰化市大竹國小
The students are reading a newspaper to learn about current events. 
同學們正在讀報瞭解時事。
They also improve their reading abilities by reading newspapers. 
他們可以藉由讀報來提升閱讀能力。

title: Word of the Day: shoot 投籃
desc:
彰化縣彰化市大竹國小
The students are practicing shooting the basketball. 
學生正在練習投籃。
They take turns shooting the ball.  
他們輪流投籃。

title: Word of the Day: number 數字
desc:
彰化縣溪州鄉水尾國小
The students are doing a puzzle game to learn numbers in English. 
學生們正在玩一個益智遊戲來學習英語中的數字。
They are matching the number cards with the correct word cards. 
他們正在將數字卡片與正確的單字卡片進行匹配。

title: Word of the Day: pinwheel 風車
desc:
彰化縣員林市饒明國小
The students are having a great time playing with pinwheels outside. 
學生們在戶外玩風車玩得很開心。
They are running on the grass to make their pinwheels spin in the wind. 
他們在草地上奔跑，讓風車在風中旋轉。

title: Word of the Day: field trip 校外教學
desc:
彰化縣永靖鄉福興國小
Students go on a field trip to a farm to learn about plants and participate in farm activities. 
學生們到農場進行校外教學，了解植物並參與農場活動。
During the field trip, students make tofu pudding and learn about where food comes from. 
在校外教學期間，學生們製作豆腐布丁並了解食物的來源。

title: Word of the Day: water fight 打水仗
desc:
彰化縣田中鎮三潭國小
The students are having a water fight as a special graduation activity. 
學生們正在進行一場水戰，作為一項特殊的畢業活動。
They are using water blasters and buckets to play and have fun before they graduate. 
畢業前，他們用水槍和水桶來玩耍和娛樂。

彰化縣彰化市大成國小
The students are taking an outdoor education trip at Taichung Metropolitan Park.

學生在校外教學期間聽導遊講解。

導遊解釋了蜜蜂對大自然的重要性。

title: Word of the Day: zipline 滑索

學生們在校外教學活動中輪流乘坐高空滑索。

他們還可以在玩皮世界野生動物園親近動物，餵食兔子。

學生們一起敲擊鼓槌，跟著節奏打節拍。

title: Word of the Day: radish 蘿蔔

他們一起努力尋找藏在土裡的大蘿蔔。

title: Word of the Day: yo yo 溜溜球

學生們在學校學習農業耕作的知識。

指導老師教導學生如何使用消防水帶。

title: Word of the Day: mouthwash 漱口水
desc:
彰化縣彰化市大成國小
The students follow the steps to rinse with mouthwash properly. 
學生們依照步驟正確地用漱口水漱口。

他們使用漱口水來保持口腔清潔。

彰化縣彰化市大成國小

有些老師在課堂上使用科技來幫助學生更好地學習。

title: Word of the Day: restroom 洗手間

彰化縣彰化市大成國小

台灣的學生打掃校園，保持校園的乾淨整齊。

看看這群學生，他們閱讀時多麼安靜啊！

閱讀經常可以讓你增加字彙並且學到很多新知。

作為活動的一部分，他們將香混合、塑形和乾燥

學生們在校園裡遇見了一頭巨大、溫馴的水牛。

title: Word of the Day: storyteller 說故事的人

彰化縣芬園鄉文德國小
A good storyteller teaches a lesson and entertains you at the same time.  一個擅長講說故事的人可以教導大家道理，同時又兼具娛樂大眾。
The storytellers can use real or fictional information to tell a story.  
說故事的人可能用真實或者是虛構的情節來說故事。

學生們手拿絲巾，隨著輕柔的旋律翩翩起舞。

他們在舞蹈中感受到音樂的節奏和美感。

title: Word of the Day: field trip 校外教學

在這次校外教學中，他們體驗很多新的事物。

title: Word of the Day: group photo 團體照

全體畢業生、老師、校長在學校拍照。

title: Word of the Day: serve 打菜
desc:
彰化縣彰化市大竹國小
The students serve lunch to their classmates. 
學生為同學打菜。

打菜的工作每週輪替一次。

title: Word of the Day: English 英語

彰化縣彰化市快官國小

老師正在教室前面教英文。

學生們正在學習槓桿原理。

他們放置不同的重物來觀察槓桿如何保持平衡。

The students use a planisphere to learn about stars and constellations. 
學生使用星盤圖來了解星星和星座。
They find different constellations by rotating the planisphere. 
他們透過旋轉星圖來尋找不同的星座。

title: Word of the Day: seed 種子

彰化縣田尾鄉仁豊國小

In tea culture, the host prepares tea for the guests. 
在茶文化中，主人為客人泡茶。

茶文化在台灣非常重要。

要在樂樂棒的比賽中得分，跑者必須到達本壘。

他們在燈籠上面畫上不同的樣式。

透過參加台語朗讀比賽，學生可以練習台語的發音、流暢度和表達能力。

冬令營期間，學生在點燃營火前學習如何表演火舞。

他們輪流宣讀誓言，在營火旁玩樂。

title: Word of the Day: doodle 塗鴉

學生學習一些基本的直排輪滑動作。
They practice inline skating with balance and coordination to play inline hockey. 
他們練習溜直排輪，掌握平衡和協調技能，以便打直排輪曲棍球。

title: Word of the Day: basketball court 籃球場
desc:
彰化縣鹿港鎮鹿港國小
The kids are playing on the basketball court. 
小朋友在籃球上打籃球。
Most basketball courts have a hoop on each side. 
大部分的籃球場兩邊各有一個籃框。

title: Word of the Day: learning 學習
desc:
彰化縣竹塘鄉田頭國小
Alumna Huang Ya-xuan came back to school to share her learning journey and encourage students to love learning. 
田頭國小校友黃雅萱重返校園，分享學習心路歷程，鼓勵同學熱愛學習。
She gave the students tips for effective learning and encouraged them to have a positive attitude towards learning. 
她分享學生提供了有效學習的秘訣，並鼓勵他們對學習抱持正向的心態。

title: Word of the Day: meatball 貢丸
desc:
彰化縣竹塘鄉田頭國小
During their field trip, the students learn how to make meatballs step by step. 在實地考察期間，學生們一步一步學習如何製作肉丸。
They shape the meat mixture and boil the meatballs. 
他們將肉類混合物塑形並煮肉丸。

title: Word of the Day: practice 練習
desc:
彰化縣田尾鄉仁豐國小
The teacher encourages the young elementary students to take turns and practice speaking. 
老師鼓勵小學生輪流練習說話。
They not only practice expressing themselves but also practice being good listeners. 
他們不僅練習表達自己，也練習成為好的傾聽者。

title: Word of the Day: tablet 平板
desc:
彰化縣伸港鄉大同國小
The students are using tablets with keyboards in class. 
同學們在課堂上使用加上鍵盤的平板。
The students are using their tablets to learn new things in class. 
同學們在課堂上使用他們的平板來學習新的事物。

title: Word of the Day: hallway 走廊
desc:
彰化縣伸港鄉大同國小
The students walk in the hallway during recess. 學生們在下課時間走在走廊上。
They walk through the hallway to get to their classroom. 他們穿過走廊去教室。

title: Word of the Day: announcement 通知
desc:
彰化縣田尾鄉仁豐國小
The teacher makes important announcements during the class. 老師在課堂上發佈重要公告。
The students pay attention to the teacher's announcements. 學生們專心聆聽老師的公告。

title: Word of the Day: ping pong 桌球
desc:
彰化縣田中鎮三潭國小
Ping pong, also known as table tennis, is a fun sport you can play indoors. 乒乓球又稱為桌球，這是一個有趣的室內運動。
Playing ping pong can help you improve your hand-eye coordination. 打桌球可以提升你的手眼協調性。

title: Word of the Day: agility ladder 繩梯
desc:
彰化縣伸港鄉大同國小
The agility ladder helps with your speed.  繩梯幫助你提升速度。
The students move through the agility ladder quickly.  同學們快速移動通過繩梯

title: Word of the Day: grow vegetables 種植蔬菜
desc:
彰化縣田中鎮三潭國小
The students learn how to grow vegetables. 學生學習如何種植蔬菜。
They plant a seed in a pot to grow vegetables. 他們在花盆裡種下種子來種植蔬菜。

title: Word of the Day: contraption 裝置
desc:
彰化縣田尾鄉仁豊國小
The students are making different contraptions with building blocks. 
學生們用積木打造不同的裝置。
They follow instructions to build their contraptions. 
他們遵循指示來建造他們的裝置。

title: Word of the Day: shot put 鉛球
desc:
彰化縣田尾鄉仁豊國小
The students are practicing shot put in the field. 同學在操場上練習推鉛球。
The students are taking turns doing shot put for track and field. 同學們輪流推鉛球為田徑賽做準備。

title: Word of the Day: swing 盪鞦韆
desc:
彰化縣田尾鄉仁豊國小
During recess, students like to swing. 下課時，學生們喜歡玩盪鞦韆。
You kick your legs up and down to swing. 盪鞦韆時，你的腳要上下踢動。

title: Word of the Day: social studies 社會科
desc:
彰化縣田尾鄉仁豊國小
The teacher is teaching social studies. 老師正在教社會科。
The students pay attention to the teacher teaching social studies.  學生們在老師教社會科的時候全神貫注。

title: Word of the Day: tablet 平板
desc:
彰化縣田尾鄉仁豊國小
The students are using tablets with keyboards in class. 
同學們在課堂上使用加上鍵盤的平板。
The students are using their tablets to learn new things in class. 
同學們在課堂上使用他們的平板來學習新的事物。

title: Word of the Day: Taiwanese 台語
desc:
彰化縣田尾鄉仁豊國小
The students learn Taiwanese in class.同學們在課堂上學習台語。
They learn Taiwanese by watching a video in class.他們觀看影片學習台語。

title: Word of the Day: shoes 鞋子
desc:
彰化縣芳苑鄉路上國小
The students are taking off their shoes and changing into indoor slippers. 學生們正在脫鞋，換上室內拖鞋。
They follow the rule of switching shoes before entering the classroom to keep it clean. 他們遵守進入教室前換鞋的規則，以保持教室清潔。

title: Word of the Day: mark 批改
desc:
彰化縣芳苑鄉路上國小
The teacher asks the students to exchange and mark each other's worksheets. 
老師請學生交換並批改彼此的作業。
The students have to be careful to mark any mistakes with a red pen. 
學生必須小心地用紅筆標記任何錯誤。

title: Word of the Day: xylophone 木琴
desc:
彰化縣芳苑鄉路上國小
The students are learning to play the xylophone by reading sheet music. 學生們正在透過閱讀樂譜學習彈奏木琴。
The xylophone is played by striking the bars with a small mallet to produce sound. 木琴的演奏是用小槌敲擊琴條來產生聲音。

title: Word of the Day: plant 種植
desc:
彰化縣芳苑鄉新寶國小
The students are learning how to plant sweet potato vines. 
學生們正在學習如何種植地瓜藤。
They dig the soil, plant the slips, and water them to help them grow. 
他們挖土、種植地瓜苗，並澆水來幫助它們生長。

title: Word of the Day: play 話劇
desc:
彰化縣芳苑鄉新寶國小
The students are performing an English play on stage. 
學生們正在舞台上表演英文話劇。
By acting in the play, they practice speaking English in a fun way. 
透過演戲，他們以有趣的方式練習英語口說。

title: Word of the Day: firefighter 消防員
desc:
彰化縣芳苑鄉新寶國小
The firefighters come to the school to teach students proper fire safety. 消防員來到學校，教導學生正確的防火安全知識。
The firefighters are also teaching the students about basic water safety using a lifebuoy. 他們還使用救生圈，向學生講解基本的水上安全知識。

title: Word of the Day: Pacer Test 漸速耐力折返跑測驗
desc:
彰化縣溪州鄉水尾國小
The students are doing the Pacer Test on the track, running back and forth as the beeps get faster. 學生們正在跑道上進行漸速耐力折返跑測驗，隨著嗶聲加快，他們來回奔跑。
The Pacer Test helps check their heart and lung endurance by making them run longer and faster. 這項測驗可以測試他們的心肺耐力，讓他們跑得更久、更快。

title: Word of the Day: brick 磚
desc:
彰化縣竹塘鄉田頭國小
The students took part in a hands-on workshop at the brick kiln. 
學生們參加了磚窯的實作研討會。
They used miniature brick molds to create handcrafted brick candle holders. 他們使用微型磚模製作手工磚燭台。

title: Word of the Day: kiln 窯
desc:
彰化縣竹塘鄉田頭國小
The students went on a field trip to visit a brick kiln factory. 
學生們進行了校外教學，參觀了磚窯廠。
They listened to the guide’s explanation of the history of the brick kiln factory.  他們聆聽導遊講解磚窯廠的歷史。

title: Word of the Day: chocolate 巧克力
desc:
彰化縣芳苑鄉 新寶國小
The students are learning to make chocolate fondue. 
學生們正在學習製作巧克力火鍋。
They melt the chocolate and dip fruit, marshmallows, and cookies for a delicious treat. 
他們融化巧克力，並蘸上水果、棉花糖和餅乾，享受美味的點心。

title: Word of the Day: woodworking 木工
desc:
彰化縣竹塘鄉田頭國小
The students are creating wooden crafts in their woodworking class. 學生們在木工課上製作木製工藝品。
During the woodworking class,they are learning how to hammer nails and use an electric drill. 在木工課上，他們學習如何釘釘子和使用電鑽。

title: Word of the Day: farming 耕作
desc:
彰化縣二林鎮萬興國小
The students gathered in the library for a lesson on food and farming education.  
學生們聚集在圖書館上食農業教育課。
They learned how these traditional farming tools were used in daily rural life in the past. 
他們學習傳統農具在過去的農村日常生活中是如何使用的。

title: Word of the Day: science class 自然課
desc:
彰化縣北斗鎮萬來國小
The students are making Tanghulu, popcorn, and chocolate fondue in their science class.  
學生在科學課上製作糖葫蘆、爆米花和巧克力火鍋。
Through these hands-on activities, they are exploring scientific principles and applying their knowledge in fun ways during science class. 
透過這些實作活動，他們在科學課上探索科學原理並以有趣的方式運用他們的知識。

title: Word of the Day: coffee 咖啡
desc:
彰化縣芬園鄉同安國小
The students learned how to make pour-over coffee stands by cutting, drilling, and sanding wood during the coffee class. 
學生們在咖啡課上學習如何透過切割、鑽孔和打磨木材來製作手沖咖啡架。
They also learned how to roast and grind coffee beans, then packed the coffee powder into drip coffee bags. 
他們還學習如何烘焙和研磨咖啡豆，然後將咖啡粉放入滴濾咖啡袋。

title: Word of the Day: fitness test 體適能檢測
desc:
彰化縣福興鄉西勢國小
The school organized a physical fitness test for teachers and staff to assess their overall health and fitness levels. 學校組織教職員進行體能檢測，以評估他們的整體健康狀況。
This fitness test aims to promote the importance of regular exercise and maintaining good physical condition for a healthier lifestyle. 此次檢測旨在宣傳定期運動和保持良好身體狀況對於更健康生活方式的重要性。

title: Word of the Day: fruit 水果
desc:
彰化縣彰化市南興國小
The students are learning how to make fruit platters.  學生們正在學習如何製作水果拼盤。
They arrange fruit to create creative designs on slices of toast. 他們將水果排列在麵包片上，形成創意十足的圖案。

title: Word of the Day: dye 染
desc:
彰化縣彰化市南興國小
The students are following the teacher’s instructions to dye fabric. 
學生們正按照老師的指示染布料。
They use different dyes, rubber bands, and white handkerchiefs to create their designs. 
他們使用不同的染料、橡皮筋和白手帕來創造他們的設計。

title: Word of the Day: water rocket 水火箭
desc:
彰化縣彰化市南興國小
The students are assembling car-shaped water rockets. 學生們正在組裝汽車形水火箭。
Using the principles of water rocket propulsion, they also compete in races. 他們也利用水火箭推進的原理來參加比賽。

title: Word of the Day: eco-pond 生態池
desc:
彰化縣芳苑鄉新寶國小
The school's eco-pond helps plants and animals grow.  
學校的生態池塘有助於植物和動物的生長。
In the eco-pond, water plants and small fish can be seen living in harmony.  
生態池中，水草與小魚和諧相處。
The eco-pond teaches students about nature and how to take care of the environment. 
生態池塘向學生傳授自然知識以及如何保護環境。

title: Word of the Day: art class 美勞課
desc:
彰化縣二林鎮萬興國小
The students are making "springy animals" in art class.  
美術課上，學生們正在製作「彈力動物」。
They fold and color paper strips to create springy legs for their animals in art class. 
他們在美術課上折疊和著色紙條來為動物製作有彈性的腿。

title: Word of the Day: dance 跳舞
desc:
彰化縣竹塘鄉田頭國小
The students dance to the music. 學生們跟隨著音樂節奏跳舞。
The students dance together in class. 學生們在課堂上一起舞蹈。

title: Word of the Day: board game 桌遊
desc:
彰化縣竹塘鄉田頭國小
The students form groups to play a board game. 同學們分組玩桌遊。
They enjoy playing the board game in class. 他們很喜歡在課堂上玩桌遊。

title: Word of the Day: drum 鼓
desc:
彰化縣竹塘鄉田頭國小
The drum is a common instrument in Taiwan. 鼓是台灣常見的樂器。
The students are practicing playing the drums. 學生們正在練習打鼓。

title: Word of the Day: stretch 伸展
desc:
彰化縣竹塘鄉田頭國小
The students are doing their stretching exercise. 學生們正在做伸展運動。
Streching helps muscles and joints stay healthy. 拉伸有助於肌肉和關節保持健康。

title: Word of the Day: mobile library 行動圖書館
desc:
彰化縣竹塘鄉田頭國小
The mobile library is a truck that's been converted into a small library. 行動圖書館是由卡車改裝的小圖書館。
The mobile library can bring lots of books to students at different schools! 行動圖書館可以將書帶給不同學校的學生閱讀。

title: Word of the Day: rollerblade 溜直排輪
desc:
彰化縣竹塘鄉田頭國小
These students are practicing to rollerblade. 這些學生正在練習溜直排輪。
Rollerblading can be for fun and also for exercise. 溜直排輪既可提供娛樂，又可作為運動。

title: Word of the Day: basketball court 籃球場
desc:
彰化縣芳苑鄉路上國小
The kids are playing on the basketball court. 小朋友在籃球上打籃球。
Most basketball courts have a hoop on each side. 大部分的籃球場兩邊各有一個籃框。

title: Word of the Day: sweep 掃
desc:
彰化縣竹塘鄉田頭國小
Every day, students sweep away fallen leaves on school grounds. 
每天學生打掃校園的落葉。
Students in Taiwan sweep the school grounds, keeping them clean and neat.         台灣的學生打掃校園，保持校園的乾淨整齊。

title: Word of the Day: soccer ball 足球
desc:
彰化縣芬園鄉同安國小
The students learn how to dribble a soccer ball. 學生學習如何連續帶球。
They shoot the soccer ball. 他們射門。

title: Word of the Day: soccer 足球
desc:
彰化縣芬園鄉同安國小
Soccer is a popular sport around the world. 足球是世界上非常流行的運動。
The students are playing in a soccer game. 學生正在進行一場足球賽。

title: Word of the Day: violin 小提琴
desc:
彰化縣芬園鄉同安國小
The students practice the violin in class. 學生們在課堂上練習小提琴。
They follow the teacher's instructions to play the violin. 他們按照老師的指示拉小提琴。

title: Word of the Day: recorder 直笛
desc:
彰化縣竹塘鄉田頭國小
The recorder is the first musical instrument that many students learn. 
直笛是很多學生學的第一項樂器。
You can play many songs on a recorder. 
你可以用直笛吹奏很多歌曲。

title: Word of the Day: contraption 裝置
desc:
彰化縣芬園鄉同安國小
The students are making different contraptions with building blocks. 
學生們用積木打造不同的裝置。
They follow instructions to build their contraptions. 
他們遵循指示來建造他們的裝置。

title: Word of the Day: taco 塔可餅 （墨西哥捲餅）
desc:
彰化縣二林鎮萬興國小
The students are making tacos by preparing tortillas and adding delicious fillings. 學生們正在製作墨西哥捲餅，準備玉米餅並添加美味的餡料。
The students are making their own tacos by rolling the dough and cooking it in a pan. 學生們正在製作自己的墨西哥捲餅，他們將麵團擀開，然後放在平底鍋裡煎。

title: Word of the Day: cartons 紙盒
desc:
彰化縣溪州鄉水尾國小 
The students are cleaning cartons as part of their recycling project. 
資源回收的一部分，學生們正在清理飲料紙盒。
They cut open the cartons and rinse them thoroughly. 
他們剪開飲料紙盒並徹底沖洗。

title: Word of the Day: closing ceremony 結業式
desc:
彰化縣社頭鄉湳雅國小
The school is hosting a closing ceremony to mark the end of the semester. 學校正在舉辦閉幕式，標誌著學期的結束。
During the closing ceremony, awards are presented, and teachers share reminders for the winter break. 閉幕式上，教師們進行了頒獎，並分享了寒假的提醒。

title: Word of the Day: poster 海報
desc:
彰化縣芳苑鄉路上國小
The students are drawing illustrations for a poster. 
學生們正在繪製海報插圖。
They are collaborating to complete the poster as a team. 
他們正在合作完成海報。

title: Word of the Day: e-card 電子賀卡
desc:
彰化縣芳苑鄉路上國小
The students are designing e-cards on their tablets to celebrate the Lunar New Year. 學生們正在平板電腦上設計電子賀卡來慶祝農曆新年。
They use creative elements to make their e-cards festive and unique for 2025. 他們運用創意元素，使他們的 2025 年電子賀卡充滿節日氣氛且獨一無二。

title: Word of the Day: card game 紙牌遊戲
desc:
彰化縣芳苑鄉路上國小
The students are playing a card game. 學生們正在玩紙牌遊戲。
The card game helps enhance students' logical thinking and focus. 紙牌遊戲有助於增強學生的邏輯思維和專注力。

title: Word of the Day: prize 獎品
desc:
彰化縣溪州鄉溪州國小
The students go to the table to choose a prize. 學生來到桌邊選擇獎品。
They turn in their points to receive a prize. 他們交出點數兌換獎品。

title: Word of the Day: pot 花盆
desc:
彰化縣溪州鄉水尾國小
The students put soil and seeds in the pot. 學生將土壤和種子放入花盆中。
The students water the seeds in the pots. 學生們給花盆裡的種子澆水。

title: Word of the Day: spring couplets 春聯
desc:
彰化縣社頭鄉湳雅國小
The students are writing square spring couplets for the Chinese New Year celebration. 
學生們正在寫方形春聯，慶祝農曆新年。
The principal is helping the students write square spring couplets. 
校長正在協助學生寫春聯。

title: Word of the Day: jump 跳躍
desc:
彰化縣永靖鄉福興國小
The students practice the long jump. 
學生們練習跳遠。
After each jump, the teacher measures the distance. 
每次跳遠後，老師都會測量跳多遠的距離。

title: Word of the Day: tee-ball 樂樂棒球
desc:
彰化縣北斗鎮北斗國小
In tee-ball, you hit the ball with a bat.  
在玩樂樂棒時，您使用球棒擊球。
To score a point in tee-ball, the runner has to get to the home plate.  
要在樂樂棒的比賽中得分，跑者必須到達本壘。

title: Word of the Day: reindeer model 馴鹿模型
desc:
彰化縣溪州鄉水尾國小
The students and teachers work together to assemble a reindeer model. 學生和老師一起合作組裝馴鹿模型。
The reindeer model will be displayed as part of the Christmas decorations. 馴鹿模型將作為聖誕裝飾的一部分展出。

title: Word of the Day: Chinese New Year 農曆新年
desc:
彰化縣溪州鄉水尾國小
The teacher allows students to decorate the blackboard with their artwork for the Chinese New Year celebration. 
老師允許學生用自己的藝術作品裝飾黑板，慶祝農曆新年。
Students use chalk to draw festive pictures on the blackboard to celebrate Chinese New Year. 
學生們用粉筆在黑板上畫節慶的圖畫來慶祝農曆新年。

title: Word of the Day: paper model house 紙模型屋
desc:
彰化縣溪州鄉水尾國小
The students make paper model houses.  學生製作紙模型房屋。
They punch out the pieces from a kit to assemble their paper model houses. 他們從工具箱中取出零件來組裝紙模型房子。

title: Word of the Day: PaGamO 打Game學
desc:
彰化縣芳苑鄉新寶國小
Tzu Chi volunteers taught students about environmental protection and disaster prevention using PaGamO. 
慈濟志工利用PaGamO向學生講授環保及防災知識。
Through PaGamO, a gamified online learning platform, students explored these topics in a fun and engaging way. 
透過遊戲化的線上學習平台 PaGamO，學生們以有趣且引人入勝的方式探索這些主題。

title: Word of the Day: poster 海報
desc:
彰化縣溪州鄉水尾國小
Students work together to design a large poster celebrating the arrival of 2025. 學生們共同設計了一張慶祝 2025 年到來的大型海報。
The poster highlights their creativity and excitement for the New Year. 海報彰顯了他們的創造力和對新年的興奮之情。

title: Word of the Day: touch screen TV 觸控螢幕電視
desc:
彰化縣社頭鄉湳雅國小
The students practice spelling on an interactive touch screen TV. 學生們在互動式觸控螢幕電視上練習拼字。
They use the touch screen TV to select and arrange letters to form words. 他們使用觸控螢幕電視來選擇和排列字母來組成單字。

title: Word of the Day: breathing light 呼吸燈
desc:
彰化縣溪州鄉溪州國小
The students are learning to program an LED to create a breathing light by following the teacher’s instructions.  
學生們正在按照老師的指示學習對LED進行編程，以產生呼吸燈。
The breathing light slowly pulsates between bright and dim, almost as if it’s breathing. 
呼吸光在明亮和暗淡之間緩慢脈動，就像在呼吸一樣。

title: Word of the Day: draw 抽獎
desc:
彰化縣社頭鄉湳雅國小
Today, children enjoyed one of their favorite activities, a lucky raffle draw for the school's reading activity! 
今天，孩子們享受了他們最喜歡的活動之一——學校讀書活動幸運抽獎！
Representatives from each class were there to make sure the draw was fair and honest, so everyone could trust the results. 
每個班級的代表都在場，以確保抽獎公平、誠實，以便抽獎結果能取信於每個人。

title: Word of the Day: wood 木頭
desc:
彰化縣溪州鄉水尾國小
The students are making cats out of wood in woodworking class.  木工課上，學生們正在用木頭製作貓。
They use a special tool to etch the faces onto the wood. 他們使用特殊的工具將貓臉蝕刻在木頭上。

title: Word of the Day: online class 線上課程
desc:
彰化縣溪州鄉水尾國小
College students lead an online class for elementary students. 大學生帶領小學生上線上課程。
Students practice their bilingual skills in the online class. 同學們在線上課程練習雙語的技能。

title: Word of the Day: distance learning 遠距學習
desc:
彰化縣溪州鄉水尾國小
The students participate in a distance learning program. 學生參加遠距學習計畫。
In the distance learning program, the students focus on learning English. 在遠距學習計畫中，學生專注於學習英語。

title: Word of the Day: fitness test 體能測驗
desc:
彰化縣溪州鄉水尾國小
The students are practicing for their fitness test. 學生們正在為體能測驗進行練習。
A fitness test may include sit-ups and stretches. 體能測試可能包括仰臥起坐和伸展運動。

title: Word of the Day: award 獎
desc:
彰化縣溪州鄉水尾國小
The students receive awards at the ceremony. 學生們在典禮時獲頒獎項。
They gather together to receive their awards. 他們聚在一起領獎。

title: Word of the Day: Christmas celebration 慶祝聖誕
desc:
彰化縣溪州鄉水尾國小
Santa Claus gives gifts to the students during the Christmas celebration. 在聖誕慶祝活動中，聖誕老人送禮物給學生們。
Santa Claus greets the students during the Christmas celebration. 
在聖誕慶祝活動當中，聖誕老人向同學們問候。

title: Word of the Day: Wisdom Ball 巧智球
desc:
彰化縣溪州鄉三條國小
The teacher introduces the Wisdom Ball to the students, encouraging them to interact with its dials and sliders. 
老師向學生介紹智慧球，鼓勵他們與球盤和滑塊互動。
Using the Wisdom Ball helps students improve their logical thinking, focus, and patience. 
使用智慧球可以幫助學生提升邏輯思考、專注力和耐心。

title: Word of the Day: sewing machine 縫紉機
desc:
彰化縣溪州鄉水尾國小
The teacher helps the students use a sewing machine. 
老師幫助學生使用縫紉機。
The student practices using a sewing machine. 
學生練習使用縫紉機。

title: Word of the Day: mobile library 行動圖書館
desc:
彰化縣田中鎮三潭國小
The mobile library is a truck that's been converted into a small library. 
行動圖書館是由卡車改裝的小圖書館。
The mobile library can bring lots of books to students at different schools! 行動圖書館可以將書帶給不同學校的學生閱讀。

title: Word of the Day: sweep 掃
desc:
彰化縣溪州鄉水尾國小
Every day, students sweep away fallen leaves on school grounds.         
每天學生打掃校園的落葉。
Students in Taiwan sweep the school grounds, keeping them clean and neat.         台灣的學生打掃校園，保持校園的乾淨整齊。

title: Word of the Day: snack 點心
desc:
彰化縣二林鎮萬興國小
The teacher prepares toasted bread with chocolate filling as a snack for the students. 
老師為學生準備了夾有巧克力的烤麵包當點心。
The students happily enjoy the snack. 
學生們開心地享用小吃。

title: Word of the Day: essay 作文
desc:
彰化縣二林鎮萬興國小
The teacher is reviewing students' essays. 
老師正在批改學生的作文。
The teacher marks areas in the essays that need improvement. 
老師標記出文章中需要改進的地方。

title: Word of the Day: rhythm 節奏
desc:
彰化縣芳苑鄉新寶國小
The teacher uses claves to create a rhythm for the students to follow. 老師使用響棒打節奏讓學生跟節拍。
They move in sync with the rhythm set by the teacher. 他們隨著老師的節奏同步做動作。

title: Word of the Day: jump rope 跳繩
desc:
彰化縣芳苑鄉新寶國小
彰化縣芳苑鄉新寶國小
The students use a long rope for jumping rope. 
學生們用一條長繩子來跳繩。
They must jump in sync to keep the rhythm and successfully jump rope. 他們必須同步跳躍才能保持節奏並成功跳繩。

title: Word of the Day: point 點數
desc:
彰化縣芳苑鄉新寶國小
Students earn points in class for good behavior and achievements, which are added to their learning passports. 學生在課堂上因良好的行為和成就而獲得積分，這些積分將被添加到他們的學習護照中。
At the end of the term, they can exchange these points for prizes. 學期結束時，他們可以用這些積分兌換獎品。

title: Word of the Day: typing competition 打字比賽
desc:
彰化縣芳苑鄉新寶國小
Students are practicing their typing skills in the English typing competition. 學生在英語打字比賽中練習打字技巧。
This typing competition helps them type faster and improve their English spelling. 這場打字比賽可以幫助他們提高打字速度並提高英語拼字能力。

title: Word of the Day: write 寫作
desc:
彰化縣彰化市大成國小
The teacher is guiding the students on how to write. 老師正在指導學生如何寫作。
Writing helps improve the students' communication skills. 寫作有助於提升學生的溝通能力。

title: Word of the Day: jump rope 跳繩
desc:
彰化縣彰化市大成國小
The students use a long jump rope for jumping rope. 學生們用一條長繩子來跳繩。
They must jump in sync to keep the rhythm and successfully jump rope. 他們必須同步跳躍才能保持節奏並成功跳繩。

title: Word of the Day: professional development 專業進修
desc:
彰化縣二林鎮萬興國小
In Taiwan, all schools have professional development sessions for teachers. 在台灣，所有學校都有教師專業訓練課程。
Teachers learn new skills and strategies during their professional development sessions. 
在專業訓練課程中，老師可以學到新的教學技巧與策略。

title: Word of the Day: professional development 專業進修
desc:
彰化縣彰化市大成國小
In Taiwan, all schools have professional development sessions for teachers. 在台灣，所有學校都有教師專業訓練課程。
Teachers learn new skills and strategies during their professional development sessions. 
在專業訓練課程中，老師可以學到新的教學技巧與策略。

title: Word of the Day: hurdling 跨欄賽跑
desc:
彰化縣芳苑鄉新寶國小
The students are practicing hurdling on the track. 
學生們正在跑道上練習跨欄運動。
Hurdling helps kids improve their balance and coordination. 
跨欄運動可以幫助孩子提昇平衡能力和協調能力。

title: Word of the Day: book 書
desc:
彰化縣田中鎮三潭國小
The school library is giving away old books to make space for new ones. 學校圖書館正在贈送舊書，為新書騰出空間。
Students are encouraged to pick their favorite books to take home for free. 我們鼓勵學生挑選自己喜歡的書免費帶回家。

title: Word of the Day: Chinese New Year 中國新年
desc:
彰化縣芳苑鄉新寶國小
Students gather in the auditorium to learn about Chinese New Year in English. 學生們聚集在禮堂，用英語學習中國新年。
The teacher introduces English vocabulary related to Chinese New Year. 老師介紹與中國新年有關的英語詞彙。

title: Word of the Day: relax放鬆
desc:
彰化縣田中鎮三潭國小
Students relax their eyes by looking far at the sky and then near at their fingers.  
學生們透過遠看天空然後近看手指來放鬆眼睛。
This simple eye exercise helps relax and refresh their vision. 
這個簡單的眼保健操有助於放鬆和刷新他們的視力。

title: Word of the Day: currency 貨幣
desc:
彰化縣芳苑鄉路上國小
The students examine different currencies from different parts of the world. 學生檢視來自世界不同地區的不同貨幣。
They compare the currencies while having a discussion. 
他們一邊討論一邊比較貨幣。

title: Word of the Day hairstylist髮型師
desc:
彰化縣竹塘鄉長安國小
The hairstylists came to the school to give free haircuts to students. 
髮型師來到學校為學生免費理髮。
The students were happy to get a new haircut from the hairstylists. 
學生們很高興能得到髮型師的新髮型。

title: Word of the Day: gingerbread house 薑餅屋
desc:
彰化縣芳苑鄉路上國小
The students make gingerbread houses in class. 
學生們在課堂上製作薑餅屋。
They use gingerbread cookies and different decortations to make their gingerbread houses. 
他們用薑餅餅乾和不同的裝飾品來製作薑餅屋。

title: Word of the Day: combine harvester 聯合收割機
desc:
彰化縣芳苑鄉路上國小
A combine harvester moves back and forth in the field. 
聯合收割機在田裡來回移動。
When the combine harvester is full, the harvested rice is transferred to a truck. 
當聯合收割機裝滿時，收穫的稻米被轉移到卡車上。

title: Word of the Day: daily routine日常生活作息
desc:
彰化縣社頭心湳雅國小
The students are learning about daily routines. 
學生們正在學習日常生活作息。
They participate in an activity where they match daily routines with specific times. 
他們在進行表達日常生活搭配特定時間的活動。

title: Word of the Day: fair 園遊會(2)
desc:
彰化縣彰化市中山國小
The school organized a fair featuring a variety of games, including puzzles and hands-on activities. 
學校舉辦了一場以各種遊戲為主題的園遊會，包括拼圖和動手活動。
At the fair, students visited various booths to play games and collect points. 在展會上，學生們到各個攤位，玩遊戲並收集點數。

title: Word of the Day: saxophone 薩克斯風
desc:
彰化縣彰化市中山國小
Saxophone is a shiny metal instrument that makes music when you blow into it. 
薩克斯風是一種閃亮的金屬樂器，當你吹它時就會發出音樂。
Saxophone is used in jazz, pop, and band music to play beautiful melodies. 薩克斯風用於爵士樂、流行音樂和樂隊音樂中，用來演奏優美的旋律。

title: Word of the Day: rub 拓印
desc:
彰化縣社頭鄉湳雅國小
The students are learning how to do leaf rubbing with crayons and paper. 學生們正在學習如何用蠟筆和紙拓印樹葉。
They carefully rub over the leaf to show its veins and shape on paper. 
他們小心翼翼地拓印葉子，在紙上顯示葉子的紋理和形狀。

title: Word of the Day: remote control toy 遙控玩具
desc:
彰化縣溪州鄉溪州國小
The students are playing with remote control toys. 
學生們正在玩遙控玩具。
They use their tablets to control the remote control toys. 
他們使用平板電腦來控制遙控玩具。

title: Word of the Day: celebrate 慶祝
desc:
彰化縣芳苑鄉新寶國小
The students celebrate Christmas at school. 學生們在學校慶祝聖誕節。
They celebrate Christmas by singing Christmas songs and playing Christmas music. 他們透過唱聖誕歌曲和演奏聖誕音樂來慶祝聖誕節。

title: Word of the Day: Chinese class 國語課
desc:
彰化縣竹塘鄉田頭國小
The students are in Chinese class.  同學們正在上國語課。
They learn Chinese characters in Chinese class.  他們在國語課學習中文字。

title: Word of the Day: talent show 才藝表演
desc:
彰化縣芳苑鄉路上國小
A talent show is when students perform their special skills for others to enjoy. 
才藝表演是學生表演特殊才藝給別人欣賞的機會。
During the talent show, students play different musical instruments, sing or dance. 
在這場才藝表演中，同學們演奏不同的樂器、唱歌或跳舞。

title: Word of the Day: self-assessment 自我評量
desc:
彰化縣竹塘鄉田頭國小
The students use tablets for self-assessment. 
同學們用平板電腦做自我評量。
The tablets help the students do their self-assessment. 
平板電腦讓學生可以做自我評量。

title: Word of the Day: Taiko drum 太鼓
desc:
彰化縣溪州鄉三條國小
The students practice the Taiko drum. 學生們練習打太鼓。
They play the Taiko drum in unison. 他們打太鼓時動作整齊劃一。

title: Word of the Day: Taiko drum 太鼓
desc:
彰化縣竹塘鄉長安國小
The students practice the Taiko drum. 學生們練習打太鼓。
They play the Taiko drum in unison. 他們打太鼓時動作整齊劃一。

title: Word of the Day: rehearsal 排練
desc:
彰化縣永靖鄉福興國小
Students had a rehearsal for sports day on the track and field. 學生們在操場上為即將到來的運動會進行排練。
During the rehearsal, they learned to follow commands and move together. 在排練過程中，他們學會了聽從指揮，確保動作協調。

title: Word of the Day: camping activity 露營活動
desc:
彰化縣彰化市中山國小
The students are working together to prepare meals during their camping activity. 學生們在露營活動期間一起準備餐點。
Through this camping activity, they learn cooperation and essential life skills by cooking as a team. 透過這次露營活動，他們透過團隊烹飪學習合作和基本的生活技能。

title: Word of the Day: tent 帳篷
desc:
彰化縣彰化市中山國小
The students are working together to set up tents for their camping trip. 學生們正一起為露營旅行搭建帳篷。
They pull and fix the poles carefully to make the tents stand tall. 
他們小心翼翼地拉動、固定住帳桿，讓帳篷矗立起來。

title: Word of the Day: Taiwanese 台語
desc:
彰化縣竹塘鄉田頭國小
The teacher is teaching Taiwanese in Taiwanese class. 
這位老師正在台語課教台語。
The students learn Taiwanese from a story book. 
學生們從故事書中學習台語。

title: Word of the Day: activity 活動
desc:
彰化縣芳苑鄉新寶國小
The school organized a bicycle licensing activity. 
學校舉辦了腳踏車考照活動。
 During the activity, students practiced their cycling skills and learned about safety rules. 
在活動中，同學們學習了騎腳踏車的技能，學習了安全規則。

title: Word of the Day: rake 耙
desc:
彰化縣竹塘鄉田頭國小
The student is raking the grass. 
這學生正在耙草。
Raking the grass helps it to grow better. 
耙草有助於它更好地生長。

title: Word of the Day: QR code
desc:
彰化縣竹塘鄉田頭國小
The teacher shows the QR code on the screen. 
老師將螢幕上的QR code秀給大家掃描。
The students scan the QR code to join the game. 
學生們掃QR code加入線上遊戲。

title: Word of the Day: math 數學
desc:
彰化縣竹塘鄉田頭國小
The students are solving math problems. 
學生們正在解決數學問題。
The students are working on their math workbooks. 
學生們正在做他們的數學作業本。

title: Word of the Day: throw 丟
desc:
彰化縣永靖鄉福興國小
The students compete to see who can throw a softball the farthest. 
學生比賽看誰能把壘球丟得最遠。
They enjoy the friendly competition while practicing their throwing skills.
他們一邊享受友善的比賽，一邊練習投擲技巧。

title: Word of the Day： lawn 草坪
desc:
彰化縣永靖鄉福興國小
A worker is mowing the lawn at the school. 一名工人正在學校修剪草坪。
He drives a four-wheeled lawnmower across the lawn, back and forth. 他駕駛著四輪割草機在草坪上來回移動。

title: Word of the Day: lawn 草坪
desc:
彰化縣芳苑鄉 路上國小
A worker is mowing the lawn at the school. 一名工人正在學校修剪草坪。
He drives a four-wheeled lawnmower across the lawn, back and forth. 他駕駛著四輪割草機在草坪上來回移動。

title: Word of the Day: hula hoop 呼拉圈
desc:
彰化縣 芳苑鄉新寶國小
The students participate in various activities with hula hoops during gym class. 
體育課上，學生們用呼拉圈參加各種活動。
They use the hula hoops for exercise. 
他們使用呼拉圈進行鍛鍊。

title: Word of the Day: wash your hands 洗手
desc:
彰化縣竹塘鄉田頭國小
It's important to wash your hands after using the bathroom.  
上完廁所後洗手是很重要的。
Make sure to wash your hands with soap and water before eating.  
確定在吃東西之前要用香皂和水來洗手。

title: Word of the Day: unicycle 獨輪車
desc:
彰化縣竹塘鄉田頭國小
The students ride unicycles. 
學生騎獨輪車。
They hold hands while they ride unicycles. 
他們騎獨輪車時手牽手。

title: Word of the Day: Christmas tree 聖誕樹
desc:
彰化縣竹塘鄉長安國小
The students make Chritsmas trees in art class. 
學生在藝術課上製作聖誕樹。
The teachers help them make their Christmas trees with wooden boards and decorative materials 老師們幫他們用木板和裝飾材料製作聖誕樹

title: Word of the Day: tchoukball 巧固球
desc:

title: Word of the Day: jump rope 跳繩
desc:

title: Word of the Day: library 圖書館

title: Word of the Day: performance (n) 表演
desc:
彰化縣北斗鎮萬來國小
Students organized a flash mob performance to play the moon lute at the park in Beidou. 
學生們在北斗公園舉辦了快閃表演，彈奏月亮琵琶。
Their sudden musical performance was enjoyed by all passersby in the park. 他們突然的音樂表演受到了公園裡所有路人的欣賞。

title: Word of the Day: journalism (n) 新聞工作
desc:
彰化縣溪州鄉溪州國小
Students from Xizhou Elementary School engage with journalism at the local market by interviewing various vendors. 
溪州國小的學生透過採訪各種攤販來參與當地市場的新聞報導。
They enhance their journalism skills by recording videos and audio with tablets, documenting their community interactions. 
他們透過使用平板電腦錄製視訊和音訊、記錄社群互動來提高新聞技能。

title: Word of the Day: library (n) 圖書館
desc:
彰化縣北斗鎮萬來國小
The students go and learn about the library. 
同學們到圖書館參觀學習。
They learn about all the things they can do at the library. 
他們學習在圖書館能夠做的事情。

title: Word of the Day: cup phone 杯子電話 (小話筒）
desc:
彰化縣溪州鄉溪州國小
The students are making cup phones in class, using cups and string for a fun project 
學生們正在課堂上製作杯子小話筒，使用杯子和繩子進行有趣的項目
Through this hands-on activity, they learn basic communication skills while enjoying interactive learning. 
透過這種實作活動，他們在享受互動學習的同時學習基本的溝通技巧。

title: Word of the Day: uniform (n) 制服
desc:
彰化縣伸港鄉大同國小
School uniforms help students feel a sense of belonging and unity. 
校服幫助學生感受到歸屬感和團結感。
 
Uniforms designed for each class let students show pride and class spirit. 為每個班級設計的校服讓學生展現自豪感和班級精神。

title: Word of the Day: modelling clay 造型黏土
desc:
彰化縣社頭鄉朝興國小
You can use modelling clay to make your very own artwork. 
您可以使用造型黏土來製作自己的藝術品。
Modelling clay is easy and fun to use. 
黏土模型使用起來既簡單又有趣。

title: Word of the Day: eco pond 生態池
desc:
彰化縣北斗鎮萬來國小
The school's eco-pond helps plants and animals grow.  
學校的生態池塘有助於植物和動物的生長。
 
The eco-pond teaches students about nature and how to take care of the environment. 生態池塘向學生傳授自然知識以及如何保護環境。

title: Word of the Day: glove puppetry 布袋戲
desc:
彰化縣大村鄉村東國小
Budaixi, also known as glove puppetry, is a traditional form of puppetry in Taiwan. 
布袋戲，又稱布袋戲，是台灣傳統的木偶戲形式。
Glove puppetry usually features elaborate sets and dramatic music. 
布袋戲通常以精緻的佈景和戲劇性的音樂為特色。

title: Word of the Day: board game桌遊
desc:
彰化縣社頭鄉朝興國小
The students form groups to play a board game. 
同學們分組玩桌遊。
They enjoy playing the board game in class. 
他們很喜歡在課堂上玩桌遊。

title: Word of the Day: theater (n) 戲劇
desc:
彰化縣彰化市中山國小

Students at Zhongshan Elementary School joined a cultural experience program led by the Ministry of Culture. 
中山小學的學生參加了由文化部主導的文化體驗計畫。 
For six weeks, Director Kuo from the Ping Pong Grass Theater Group taught students about teamwork and body language. 
在六週的時間裡，萍蓬草劇團的郭導演向學生們教授團隊合作和肢體語言。
In the end, the students created a short play about Taiwan's history. 
最後，學生們創作了一部有關台灣歷史的小劇。

title: Word of the Day: activity (n) 活動
desc:
彰化縣社頭鄉朝興國小
The students are joining a woodworking activity to create their own wooden boxes. 
學生們正在參加木工活動，製作自己的木箱。
In this activity, they use sandpaper to make the wood smooth and glue to hold the pieces together. 
在這項活動中，他們使用砂紙使木材變得光滑，並使用膠水將碎片固定在一起。

title: Word of the Day: parade (n) 遊行
desc:
彰化縣北斗鎮萬來國小
The school organized a festive parade with students in colorful costumes marching through the streets. 
學校組織了一場節日遊行，學生們穿著色彩繽紛的服裝在街上遊行。
Dressed in traditional attire, the students enthusiastically joined a cultural street parade led by their teachers. 
學生們穿著傳統服裝，心情愉悅，自豪地參加了由老師帶領的文化街頭遊行。

title: Word of the Day: workbook (n) 習作簿
desc:
彰化縣伸港鄉大同國小
Workbooks help students review and apply what they learn in class. 
練習冊幫助學生複習和應用他們在課堂上學到的知識。
 
By completing the exercises in their workbooks, students can check their understanding and explore the lesson in greater depth. 
透過完成練習冊中的練習，學生可以檢查他們的理解並更深入地探索課程。

title: Word of the Day: run (v) 跑步
desc:
彰化縣竹塘鄉長安國小
The students are running at the track. 
學生們在跑道上跑步。
Running is good exercise and students do it every day. 
跑步是很好的運動，學生們每天都在跑步。

title: Word of the Day: ocarina (n) 陶笛
desc:
彰化縣竹塘鄉長安國小
These students are playing the ocarina. 
這些學生正在吹陶笛。
The ocarina is a musical wind instrument. 
陶笛是一種管樂器。

title: Word of the Day: dance performances 舞蹈表演
desc:
彰化縣北斗鎮萬來國小
The students are participating in dance performances for the whole school. 學生們正在參加全校的舞蹈表演。
Through dance performances, the students gain confidence and spark their interest in creative expression. 
透過舞蹈表演，學生們獲得了自信並激發了他們對創意表達的興趣。

title: Word of the Day: energy 能量
desc:
彰化縣北斗鎮萬來國小
The students are participating in a Green Energy Summer Camp, learning about natural energy sources. 
學生們正在參加綠色能源夏令營，學習自然能源。
They are designing green energy buildings to apply what they’ve learned about renewable energy. 
他們正在設計綠色能源建築，以應用他們所學到的可再生能源知識。

title: Word of the Day: human library 真人圖書館
desc:
彰化縣伸港鄉大同國小 
The students listened to stories shared by Mr. Lu during a Human Library event.
在人類圖書館活動中，學生們聆聽了陸老師分享的故事。
Both the children and teachers actively participated in the Human Library event. 
孩子和老師們都積極參與了人類圖書館活動。

title: Word of the Day: workshop 工作坊
desc:
彰化縣埤頭鄉埤頭國中
Students at Pitou Junior High School are participating in a creative workshop. 
埤頭國中的學生正在參加創意工作坊。
In this workshop, they are learning how to tell stories using imagery and media. 
在這個研討會上，他們正在學習如何使用圖像和媒體來講故事。

title: Word of the Day: club 社團
desc:
彰化縣溪州鄉溪州國小
Providing a variety of clubs for students should be a goal for every school. 為學生提供多樣化的社團應該是每所學校的目標。
Clubs are the best way for students to explore many different forms of art and skills, allowing them to find their passion and making learning more enjoyable. 
社團是學生探索多種不同形式的藝術和技能的最佳方式，讓他們找到自己的熱情並享受學習。

title: Word of the Day: reading 閱讀
desc:
彰化縣埤頭鄉埤頭國中
The students gathered in the activity room to attend a presentation on reading skills. 
同學們聚集在綜合活動教室，參加閱讀技巧講座。
They learned valuable reading techniques and how to apply them. 
他們學習了寶貴的閱讀技巧以及如何應用它們。

title: Word of the Day: memory game 記憶遊戲
desc:
彰化縣溪湖鎮湖西國小
Memory games are a fun way to learn the names and shapes of some musical instruments. 記憶遊戲是學習樂器的名稱和認識不同樂器形狀的有趣方式。
In this memory game, students will choose pairs of cards to flip over and win by revealing all the matching pairs. 在這個記憶遊戲中，學生將選擇成對的卡片翻開，當卡片配對他將就獲勝。

title: Word of the Day: competition (n) 比賽
desc:
彰化縣伸港鄉大同國小
Rehearsing for the school's upcoming reading competition is a great way to build confidence. 
為學校即將舉行的朗讀比賽進行排練是建立信心的好方法。
The students practice with the hope of giving an excellent performance in the competition. 
同學共同練習，希望能在比賽中取得優異的成績。

title: Word of the Day: theater (n) 劇院
desc:
彰化縣溪湖鎮湖西國小
Visiting the National Taichung Theater was a great experience for the students of Huxi Elementary.  
參觀台中國家歌劇院對於湖西國小的學生來說是個很棒的經驗。
They were able to explore the unique architecture and learn about different performing arts in the theater. 
他們能夠探索獨特的建築並了解不同的表演藝術。

title: Word of the Day: cooking lesson 烹飪課
desc:
彰化縣彰化市中山國小
This is a simple cooking lesson on how to make 'Phoenix Eye Cake' 
這是一個關於如何製作「鳳眼糕」的簡單烹飪課程
The students use a mold and add the ingredients inside.  
他們使用模具並將成分添加到裡面。
They are very careful not to make a mess. 
他們非常小心，以免弄亂。

title: Word of the Day: competition (n) 比賽
desc:
彰化縣埔心鄉太平國小
Rehearsing for the school's upcoming reading competition is a great way to build confidence. 
為學校即將舉行的朗讀比賽進行排練是建立信心的好方法。
The students practice with the hope of giving an excellent performance in the competition. 
同學共同練習，希望能在比賽中取得優異的成績。

title: Word of the Day: fitness (n) 健康
desc:
彰化縣芬園鄉同安國小
SH150 is a program designed to promote good health and offer fitness activities for students during their free time. SH150 是一項旨在促進身體健康並為學生在空閒時間提供健身活動的計劃。
Teaching fitness and getting students active from an early age is vital for building stronger bones and muscles. 讓學生從小養成熱愛運動和學習健身知識是對於增強骨骼和鍛鍊肌肉是極其重要。

title: Word of the Day: pineapple (n) 鳳梨
desc:
彰化縣芬園鄉同安國小
The wonderful young children from Tongan Elementary were excited to assist local farmers with the process of planting pineapples firsthand. 
來自同安國小的孩子們很高興能夠幫助當地農民直接地種植鳳梨。
This field trip was an experience to teach the importance and joy of farming as well as an understanding about how pineapples grow. 
這趟校外教學教導大家農業重要性和樂趣以及了解鳳梨如何生長的經驗。

title: Word of the Day: club (n) 社團
desc:
彰化縣伸港鄉大同國小
Providing a variety of clubs for students should be a goal for every school. 為學生提供多樣化的社團應該是每所學校的目標。
Clubs are the best way for students to explore many different forms of art and skills, allowing them to find their passion and making learning more enjoyable. 
社團是學生探索多種不同形式的藝術和技能的最佳方式，讓他們找到自己的熱情並享受學習。

title: Word of the Day: bookplate (n) 藏書章
desc:
彰化縣彰化市彰興國中
This extracurricular class is centered around creating custom bookplates with a master of his craft. 
這個課外活動的重點是與工藝大師一起製作客製化藏書章。
They listen with great interest as they are taught printmaking techniques using various traditional tools to design their own unique bookplates. 
他們專注地聆聽，學習版畫技術，並使用各種傳統工具設計自己獨特的藏書章

title: Word of the Day: museum (n) 博物館
desc:
彰化縣田中鎮新民國小
Students from Hsinmin Elementary School visited a museum to learn about traditional Nanguan and Beiguan performing arts. 
新民國小學生參觀博物館，了解南關、北關傳統表演藝術。
During the fun trip, they explored the museum and learned to play various traditional instruments. 
在這次有趣的旅行中，他們參觀了博物館並學習演奏各種傳統樂器。

title: Word of the Day: museum (n) 博物館
desc:
彰化縣溪湖鎮湖西國小
Huxi Elementary School took its students on a field trip to a museum dedicated to Nanguan and Beiguan music. 
湖西小學帶學生參觀南管北管音樂博物館。
During the fun trip, they explored the museum and learned about various traditional costumes and instruments. 
在愉快的旅程中，他們參觀了博物館，並了解了各種傳統服飾和樂器。

title: Word of the Day: press conference 記者會
desc:
彰化縣伸港鄉大同國小
Datong Elementary School held a press conference to thank the president of the parent association and his charity organization for their support. 
大同小學召開記者會，感謝家長會會長和他所屬的慈善團體的支持。
During the press conference, the principal explained how these English books improved student learning. 
在新聞發布會上，校長聲明了這些英語書籍如何改善學生的學習。

title: Word of the Day: professional development 專業進修
desc:
彰化縣埤頭鄉埤頭國中
In Taiwan, all schools have professional development sessions for teachers. 在台灣，所有學校都有教師專業訓練課程。
Teachers learn new skills and strategies during their professional development sessions. 
在專業訓練課程中，老師可以學到新的教學技巧與策略。

title: Word of the Day: glove puppetry 布袋戲
desc:
彰化縣田中鎮新民國小
Budaixi, also known as glove puppetry, is a traditional form of puppetry in Taiwan. 
布袋戲，又稱布袋戲，是台灣傳統的木偶戲形式。
Glove puppetry usually features elaborate sets and dramatic music. 
布袋戲通常以精緻的佈景和戲劇性的音樂為特色。

title: Word of the Day: jump rope 跳繩
desc:
彰化縣溪州鄉僑義國小
Jumping rope is a great form of cardio. 
跳繩是一種很好的有氧運動。
Once you get the hang of it, you can jump rope really fast! 
一旦掌握了竅門，你就能跳得很快！

title: Word of the Day: competition (n) 比賽
desc:
彰化縣溪州鄉僑義國小
The school held a competition to identify plants and animals. 
學校舉辦了一場植物和動物鑑定比賽。
The competition was meant for students to get excited about learning the names of plants and animals at school. 
比賽的目的是讓學生對在學校學習植物和動物的名稱感到興奮。

title: Word of the Day: refuse (v) 拒絕
desc:
彰化縣伸港鄉大同國小

Our school invited volunteers to help students practice how to refuse and say no to drugs.
我們學校邀請志工幫助學生練習如何拒絕、向毒品說不。
The volunteers taught us the importance of refusing drugs and making healthy choices.
志工教導我們拒絕毒品和做出健康選擇的重要性。

title: Word of the Day: drill (n) 演習
desc:
彰化縣田中鎮新民國小
Schools sometimes hold drills to teach students how to act quickly and safely during a disaster. 
學校有時會舉行演習，教導學生如何在災難中快速、安全地採取行動。
During the drills, students learn life-saving skills, such as using a fire hose and performing CPR. 
在演習期間，學生學習救生技能，例如使用消防水帶和進行心肺復甦術。

title: Word of the Day: read-aloud competition 英語朗讀比賽
desc:
彰化縣田中鎮新民國小
The students practice for their read-aloud competition. 
學生們為朗讀比賽進行練習。
The teacher helps the students prepare for their read-aloud competition. 
老師幫助學生準備朗讀比賽。

title: Word of the Day: paint (v) 畫
desc:
彰化縣溪州鄉僑義國小
The students get ready to paint their lanterns. 
同學們準備好要為他們的燈籠彩繪。
They paint different designs on their lanterns. 
他們在燈籠上面畫上不同的樣式。

title: Word of the Day: firefighter (n) 消防員
desc:
彰化縣北斗鎮北斗國中
The local firefighters visit the school to teach students fire safety procedures. 
當地消防員參觀學校，向學生教授消防安全程序。
They let the students to get a close look at the fire-fighting protective coat and oxygen mask. 
他們讓學生們近距離觀看了消防防護衣和氧氣面罩。
To make the lesson more fun and exciting, students are allowed to practice using the fire hose. This will help prepare them during an emergency. 
為了使課程更加有趣和刺激，學生可以練習使用消防水帶。這將有助於他們在緊急情況下做好準備。

title: Word of the Day: drug (n) 毒品
desc:
彰化縣伸港鄉大同國小
Students attend a presentation on the dangers of drugs.  
學生們參加有關毒品危害的說明講座。
It's important that they understand how harmful drugs can be.  
重要的是，他們要了解毒品的危害有多大。
They are encouraged to live a healthy lifestyle. 
鼓勵他們過健康的生活方式。

title: Word of the Day: earthquake drill 地震演習
desc:
彰化縣二林鎮廣興國小
The students cover their heads during the earthquake drill. 
在地震防災演練中，學生們用東西遮蓋頭部。
They go outside to learn more about an earthquake drill. 
他們到教室外學習更多地震防災演練的知識。

title: Word of the Day: freestyle football 花式足球
desc:
彰化縣北斗鎮螺陽國小
A professional football coach gives a demonstration of freestyle football. 專業足球教練示範花式足球
He performs various neat ball-tricks for the students to learn using different parts of the body. 
他為學生們表演各種巧妙的球技巧，讓他們學習使用身體的不同部位。

title: Word of the Day: Mid Autumn Festival 中秋節
desc:
彰化縣竹塘鄉長安國小
The students are learning about the Mid-Autumn Festival in school by making pomelo peel hats. 學生們在學校裡透過製作柚子皮帽來了解中秋節。
The students are having fun peeling pomelos and using the skins as hats in class. 學生們在課堂上開心地剝柚子，並用柚子皮做帽子。

title: Word of the Day: rice field 稻田
desc:
彰化縣北斗鎮螺陽國小
The students take a field trip to experience life on a rice field. 
學生們參加了校外教學，體驗稻田生活。
They wear gloves and use special tools to cut the rice stalks by themselves. 他們戴著手套，用專用工具自己割稻稈。
The hard work teaches them valuable ethics, and they still manage to smile! 辛勞的工作教他們寶貴的品德，但他們仍然面帶微笑！

title: Word of the Day: swimming class 游泳課1
desc:
彰化縣二林鎮廣興國小
The students are stretching for swimming class. 學生們正在為游泳課做伸展運動。
The students are practicing swimming in swimming class. 學生們正在游泳課上練習游泳。

title: Word of the Day: library rules 圖書館使用規則
desc:
彰化縣伸港鄉大同國小
The students go the library to learn about the library rules. 學生在圖書館學習圖書館的規則。
They attentively listen to the librarian's explanation.  他們專心地聽圖書館員的講解。
The students need to follow the library rules when they go to the library. 學生去圖書館時必須遵守圖書館的規定。

title: Word of the Day: swimming class 游泳課(2)
desc:
彰化縣二林鎮廣興國小
The students learn how to swim in swimming class. 
同學們在游泳課時學習如何游泳。
They learn the basics of swimming in swimming class. 
他們在游泳課時學習游泳的基本動作。

title: Word of the Day: taking attendance 點名
desc:
彰化縣伸港鄉大同國小
Taking attendance is an important part of class. It usually happens right at the beginning of class. 
點名是課堂中一個重要的部分，通常發生在課堂一開始。
The teacher calls the names of all the students. 老師會叫所有學生的名字。
When the teacher calls a student’s name, the student has to respond to let the teacher know they’re present.  
當老師叫到某個學生的名字時，該學生需要回答，讓老師知道他在場。
Then the teacher will write on the attendance sheet to mark the student as present.  
然後老師會在出勤表上記錄該學生已到。
If the student isn’t in class, the teacher will mark the student as absent. 
如果該學生沒有到課，老師則會標記該學生缺席。

title: Word of the Day: kick board 浮板
desc:
彰化縣二林鎮廣興國小
The students use a kick board to practicing swimming. 
學生使用踢水板練習游泳。
A kick board makes it easier to swim. 
踢水板讓游泳變得更簡單。

title: Word of the Day: eco-pond 生態池
desc:
彰化縣彰化市中山國小
The school's eco-pond helps plants and animals grow.  
學校的生態池塘有助於植物和動物的生長。
In the eco-pond, water plants and small fish can be seen living in harmony.  生態池中，水草與小魚和諧相處。
The eco-pond teaches students about nature and how to take care of the environment. 
生態池塘向學生傳授自然知識以及如何保護環境。

title: Word of the Day: drug (n) 毒品
desc:
彰化縣田中鎮三潭國小
Students attend a presentation on the dangers of drugs. It's important that they understand how harmful drugs can be. They are encouraged to live a healthy lifestyle. 
學生們參加有關毒品危害的說明講座。
重要的是，他們要了解毒品的危害有多大。鼓勵他們過健康的生活方式。

title: Word of the Day: groundhog (n) 土撥鼠
desc:
彰化縣埔鹽鄉大園國小
Groundhogs live in holes they dig in the ground. 
土撥鼠住在他們在地上挖的洞裡。
Groundhogs like to eat grass and leaves. 
土撥鼠喜歡吃草和樹葉。

title: Word of the Day: Lecture about Law 法律講座
desc:
彰化縣伸港鄉大同國小
A teacher came to Datong Elementary to give a lecture about law.  
一位老師來到大同國小進行法律講座。
Understanding the law is very important because it affects everyone living in society.  
了解法律非常重要，因為它影響著社會中的每一個人。
People can become experts in the law and work as judges and lawyers. 
人們可以成為法律專家，並擔任法官或律師。
These students have a great opportunity to learn about the law at a young age. 
這些學生在年輕時有很好的機會來學習法律。
Maybe some of them will even go to law school in the future! 
也許他們中的一些人將來會進入法學院！

title: Word of the Day: first grader 一年級生
desc:
彰化縣伸港鄉大同國小
At Datong Elementary, the first graders are starting school.  
大同小學一年級學生即將開學。
Their parents bring them to sign in on their first day of school. 
開學第一天，他們的父母帶他們去簽到。
As they start their learning journeys, they pass through three gates: the gate of politeness, the gate of intelligence, and the gate of diligent study. 
當他們開始學習之旅時，他們會經過三門：禮門、智門、精進門。
After they sign in, many students take pictures with their family outside the school to mark the occasion.  
簽到後，許多學生在校外與家人合照。
We wish all the new students good luck! 
祝福所有新同學一切順利！

title: Word of the Day: bully (v) 霸凌
desc:
彰化縣北斗鎮萬來國小
It's important to learn from an early age the negative effects of bullying. 
從小就了解霸凌的負面影響很重要。
The students are given a course on being kind, polite and respectful to their classmates. 
學生將學習如何友善、禮貌和尊重同學。

title: Word of the Day: fly kites 放風箏
desc:
CCC 紐約首府華社中文學校
A group of students from New York visited Siling elementary and made their own kites. After their kites were finished, it was time to fly them! Everyone brought their kites to the school track, and some students from Siling demonstrated how to fly a kite. The New Yorkers all tried their best to fly their kites. They even had to run really fast to keep their kites flying in the air!
一群來自紐約的學生參觀西嶺小學並製作了自己的風箏。風箏製作完成後，就到了放風箏的時間了！大家都帶著自己的風箏來到了學校跑道上，西嶺的一些學生示範如何放風箏。紐約的學生們都努力地放風箏。他們甚至必須跑得非常快才能讓風箏在空中飛翔！

title: Word of the Day: jump rope 跳繩
desc:
彰化縣竹塘鄉長安國小
The teacher shows the students how to jump rope. 
老師向學生展示如何跳繩。
The students try to jump rope. 
學生們嘗試跳繩。

title: Word of the Day: art project 美術作業
desc:
彰化縣二林鎮二林國小
The students are making art projects in class. 
學生們正在課堂上製作美術作業。
They use scissors to cut the materials. 
他們用剪刀來切割材料。
They also use glue to stick the pieces together. 
他們還使用膠水將紙片粘在一起。

title: Word of the Day: first grader 新生
desc:
彰化縣埔心鄉太平國小
The school organized activities to help first graders and their parents get to know the school better. 
學校規劃活動，幫助一年級新生及其家長更了解學校。
These events made first graders feel more comfortable in the new environment. 
這些活動讓新生更加適應新環境。
It was a warm welcome for the start of their school journey. 
整個歡迎活動為新生開啟求學旅程的序幕。

title: Word of the Day: building blocks 積木
desc:
彰化縣芬園鄉同安國小
The students are playing with building blocks. 
學生們正在玩積木。
Students are following instructions for the building blocks. 
學生們正在按照積木的說明進行操作。

title: Word of the Day: first grader 新生
desc:
彰化縣竹塘鄉長安國小
The school organized activities to help first graders and their parents get to know the school better. 
學校規劃活動，幫助一年級新生及其家長更了解學校。
These events made first graders feel more comfortable in the new environment. 
這些活動讓新生更加適應新環境。
It was a warm welcome for the start of their school journey. 
整個歡迎活動為新生開啟求學旅程的序幕。

title: Word of the Day: chocolate (n) 巧克力
desc:
彰化縣竹塘鄉長安國小
The students learn how to make chocolate snacks during a human library event. 
學生們在真人圖書館活動中學習如何製作巧克力點心零嘴。
The instructor tells the students about the health benefits of chocolate during the event. 
講師在活動中向學生講述巧克力的健康益處。

title: Word of the Day: earthquake drill 地震演習
desc:
彰化縣伸港鄉大同國小
The students cover their heads during the earthquake drill. 
在地震防災演練中，學生們用東西遮蓋頭部。

They go outside to learn more about an earthquake drill. 
他們到教室外學習更多地震防災演練的知識。

title: Word of the Day: make kites 製作風箏
desc:
CCC 紐約首府華社中文學校
Siling Elementary has a tradition of making kites. When a group of students from New York visited the school, they also had a chance to make their own kites. The teachers and students from Siling taught the New Yorkers how to make their kites. The New Yorkers used markers to draw designs on their kites, and some of them really showed off their artistic abilities! Overall, the teachers and students from Siling, as well as the visitors from New York, had a lot of fun making kites. 
西嶺國小有製作風箏的傳統。當一群來自紐約的學生參觀學校時，他們也有機會製作自己的風箏。西嶺的師生教紐約人做風箏。紐約人用彩色筆在風箏上畫圖案，其中一些真的展現了他們的藝術天賦！整體而言，西嶺師生以及來自紐約的遊客都在製作風箏的過程中獲得了很多樂趣。

title: Word of the Day: earthquake drill 地震演習
desc:
彰化縣田中鎮三潭國小
The students cover their heads during the earthquake drill. 
在地震防災演練中，學生們用東西遮蓋頭部。

They go outside to learn more about an earthquake drill. 
他們到教室外學習更多地震防災演練的知識。

title: Word of the Day: morning assembly 朝會
desc:
彰化縣田中鎮三潭國小
Morning assembly is a meeting that administrators, teachers, and students attend every morning at school. 
早會是學校行政人員、教師和學生每天早上參加的會議。

Morning assembly is a great time for staff and faculty members to share important announcements with the student body. 
晨會是教職員與學生團體分享重要公告的好時機。

title: Word of the Day: shadow puppet show 皮影戲
desc:
彰化縣彰化市中山國小
The students are putting on a shadow puppet show. 
學生們正在表演皮影戲。

A shadow puppet show uses a screen and a light. 
皮影戲使用屏幕和燈光。

title: Word of the Day: run (v) 跑步
desc:
彰化縣田中鎮三潭國小
The students are running at the track. 
學生們在跑道上跑步。

Running is good exercise and students do it every day. 
跑步是很好的運動，學生們每天都在跑步。

title: Word of the Day: drug (n) 毒品
desc:
彰化縣彰化市中山國小
An Anti-Drug Education Vehicle visits the school to promote anti-drug education. 
反毒教育車到訪學校宣傳禁毒教育。

Students learn about the harmful effects of drugs by watching videos and playing games. 學生透過觀看影片和玩遊戲來了解毒品的有害影響。

title: Word of the Day: video game 電玩遊戲
desc:
彰化縣彰化市中山國小
The students play a video game. 
學生玩電子遊戲。
The video game simulates a bowling match, and the students compete against each other in teams. 
電玩遊戲模擬保齡球比賽，學生以團隊形式進行比賽。

title: Word of the Day: Rubik's Cube 魔術方塊
desc:
彰化縣彰化市中山國小
Students learn about the Rubik's Cube in class. 
學生在課堂上了解魔術方塊。
They try to solve the Rubik's Cube. 
他們試圖解開魔術方塊。
They work together to try to solve the Rubik's Cube. 
他們共同努力解決魔術方塊問題。

title: Word of the Day: sugar refinery 糖廠
desc:
彰化縣溪湖鎮湖西國小
Three students visit their local sugar refinery. 
三位學生參觀當地的糖廠。

During their visit to the Xihu Sugar Refinery, they learn about different types of sugars. 
在參觀西湖糖廠期間，他們了解了不同類型的糖。

title: Word of the Day: pastry (n) 糕點
desc:
彰化縣彰化市中山國小
The students learn about different traditional pastries. 
學生學習不同的傳統糕點。
After learning about different pastries, the students each design their own pastry. 
在了解了不同的糕點後，學生們各自設計了自己的糕點。

title: Word of the Day: project (n) 計劃
desc:
彰化縣永靖鄉福德國小
Students at Fude Elementary School in Yongjing Township, Changhua County, participated in the Ministry of Education's Bilingual Digital Learning Project. 
彰化縣永靖鄉福德國小學生參與教育部雙語數位學習計畫。
College students visited the school to meet with younger students. They used digitial technology to help making English learning more fun.  
大學生參觀學校，與低年級學生見面。他們利用數位科技讓英語學習變得更加有趣。
Hands-on activities were also part of the event, allowing students to naturally integrate English into their learning in a relaxed environment. 
活動中還設有動手實作活動，讓學生在輕鬆的環境中自然地將英語融入學習中。

title: Word of the Day: workshop (n) 研討會 ( v.)
desc:
彰化縣伸港鄉大同國小
The school invited an expert to conduct a workshop for administrative staff about the rising interest in AI, which was sparked by ChatGPT. 
學校邀請了一位專家為行政人員舉辦了一場研討會，討論由 ChatGPT 引發大眾對人工智慧的興趣。
The workshop, held in the audiovisual room, focused on integrating technology in the classroom to enhance teaching effects.  
工作坊在視聽室舉行，重點在於如何將科技融入課堂，提升教學效果。
Participants learned about various digital tools and strategies to better incorporate technological devices into their educational practices. 
參與者了解了各種數位工具和策略，以便更好地將技術設備融入他們的教育實踐。

title: Word of the Day: instrument (n) 樂器
desc:
彰化縣埔鹽鄉大園國小
The students are participating in a hands-on experience with traditional Chinese musical instruments. 
學生們正親身體驗中國傳統樂器。
During the class, they learn about the concept of  Traditional Eight Sounds. 在課堂上，他們學習了「傳統八音」的概念。
The students look engaged and are being carefully instructed on how to use the instruments properly. 
學生們看起來很投入，並且小心謹慎地遵照指示妥善使用這些樂器。

title: Word of the Day: trim (v) 修剪
desc:
彰化縣永靖鄉福德國小
The school hired professionals to trim the trees on campus. 
學校聘請了專業人員修剪校園內的樹木。
They used a crane to lift the worker, who wore safety gear, up into the tree. 他們用起重機將這名穿著安全裝備的工人吊到樹上。
The worker used a saw to carefully cut the branches. 
工人用鋸子小心翼翼地鋸斷樹枝。

title: Word of the Day: eggplant (n) 茄子
desc:
彰化縣永靖鄉福德國小 

This cooking lesson involves a unique but delicious vegetable called 'eggplant'. The students are learning how to properly fry it. 這堂烹飪課使用了一種獨特但美味的蔬菜，叫做「茄子」。學生們正在學習如何正確地煎炒它。

Some lessons require a 'hands-on' approach. Here the students are carefully frying slices of the eggplant. 有些課程需要「實作」的方式。在這裡，學生們正在小心翼翼地煎炒茄子片。

title: Word of the Day: event (n) 活動
desc:
彰化縣永靖鄉福德國小
The school held a special event which celebrated Mother's Day and also recognized the birthdays of teachers and students for that semester. 
學校舉辦了一場特別的活動，慶祝母親節，並表彰該學期師生的生日。
The event included a video screening and ocarina performances by the students. 
活動包括影片放映和學生們的陶笛表演。
There was also an award ceremony to honor outstanding students for their achievements. 
大會也舉行了頒獎典禮，表揚優秀學生的成就。

title: Word of the Day: douhua (n) 豆花
desc:
彰化縣永靖鄉福德國小
The students are engaged in a unique educational cooking experience. They are learning to make douhua from scratch with all the proper ingredients 學生們正在參與一場獨特的教育性烹飪體驗。他們正在學習如何從頭開始製作豆花，使用所有正確的食材。

Steps in making this traditional treat include: boiling, stirring and mixing the soy milk as it slowly transforms into delicious tofu pudding.
 製作這道傳統甜品的步驟包括：煮沸、攪拌和混合豆漿，慢慢地豆漿逐漸轉變成美味的豆花。

title: Word of the Day: basketball practice 籃球訓練
desc:
彰化縣埔鹽鄉大園國小
The students are outside for basketball practice. 同學們在外面做籃球訓練。
They work hard during basketball practice. 他們非常認真地做籃球訓練。

title: Word of the Day: fire (n) 火災
desc:
彰化縣永靖鄉福德國小
Today, firefighters came to the school to teach students proper fire safety. 今天，消防員來到學校，教導學生們正確的消防安全知識。
The students each took turns practicing practicing how to use a fire extinguisher in the event of an emergency. 學生們依次練習如何在緊急情況下使用滅火器。

title: Word of the Day: recite (v) 背誦
desc:
彰化縣永靖鄉福德國小
The students find themselves in a friendly but tough competition of memorizing and reciting texts. 學生們正參加一場輕鬆但激烈的比賽，挑戰背誦文本。 
The teachers carefully listen and check to make sure the students are reciting the texts correctly. 老師們仔細聆聽並檢查，確保學生們正確地背誦的內容。

title: Word of the Day: cooking class 烹飪課
desc:
彰化縣北斗鎮萬來國小

Students are learning to make Indonesian-style fried instant noodles during the cooking class. 
學生們在烹飪課上學習製作印尼風味的炒方便麵。

Adding fresh vegetables to the noodles is a good way to make it healthier! 在麵中加入新鮮蔬菜是讓這道菜更健康的好方法！

Once the meal is finished, they gather together to enjoy what they have made as a whole class. It was delicious! 
當餐點完成後，他們聚在一起，全班一起享用他們親手製作的美食。真是美味極了！

title: Word of the Day: game (n) 遊戲
desc:
彰化縣埔鹽鄉大園國小
The students play a game using the song "Head, Shoulders, Knees, and Toes." 學生們玩了一個搭配歌曲《頭、肩、膝、腳趾》的遊戲。
The first to grab the book on the teacher's cue while singing "Head, Shoulders, Knees, and Toes wins the game." 在唱《頭、肩、膝、腳趾》時，第一個在老師提示下拿到書的人贏得了比賽。

title: Word of the Day: workbook (n) 習作
desc:
彰化縣埔心鄉太平國小
The students sometimes like to add a little color to their work, so beautiful and creative! 
學生們有時候喜歡為他們的作品增添一些色彩，真是美麗又有創意！
The workbooks are useful for helping the students learn more about SDG'S. 這些作業本對於幫助學生瞭解更多有關SDG的知識非常有用。
You can never have too much information! 
資訊永遠不嫌多！

title: Word of the Day: career day 職探日
desc:
彰化縣北斗鎮萬來國小
The students learn what it is like to be an engineer on Career Day. 學生們在職業日了解成為電工的感受。
Career Day is an opportunity to learn about different jobs they might be interested in pursuing in the future. 職業日是一個了解他們未來可能感興趣的不同工作的機會。

title: Word of the Day: spell (v) 拼字
desc:
彰化縣埔鹽鄉大園國小
The students are practicing spelling numbers. 學生們正在練習拼字數字。
They are competing to see who can spell the numbers the fastest. 他們正在競爭誰能最快地拼寫數字。

title: Word of the Day: feast (n) 盛宴
desc:
彰化縣北斗鎮萬來國小
The school prepares many ingredients for the students to make a feast. 學校準備了很多食材為學生們做一頓大餐。
The students are making the feast to celebrate their upcoming graduation. 學生們正在舉辦盛宴來慶祝即將到來的畢業典禮。

title: Word of the Day: push-up (n) 伏地挺身
desc:
彰化縣二林鎮二林國小
The students do push-ups in gym class. 學生在體育課上做伏地挺身。
They do push-ups at different angles by using boxes. 他們用盒子做不同角度的俯臥撐。
The students find doing push-ups to be difficult. 學生發現做伏地挺身很困難。
They challenge themselves to do as many push-ups as they can. 他們挑戰自己盡可能做伏地挺身。

title: Word of the Day: putty (n) 黏土
desc:
彰化縣埔鹽鄉大園國小
The students use putty in art class. 學生在美術課上使用黏土。
They use putty to create pictures instead of paint. 他們用黏土代替水彩顏料來創作圖畫。

title: Word of the Day: worksheet (n) 學習單
desc:
彰化縣埔鹽鄉大園國小
The students complete a worksheet in English class. 學生在英語課上完成一份學習單。
By doing the worksheet, they learn how to ask and tell other people's ages. 透過做學習單，他們學會如何詢問和告知他人的年齡。

title: Word of the Day: Tinikling (n) 竹竿舞
desc:
彰化縣二林鎮二林國小
The students follow instructions on how to do the Tinikling dance. 學生們按照指導如何跳竹竿舞。
In the Tinikling, you need to move with the rhythm of the bamboo poles. 在竹竿舞中，您需要隨著竹竿的節奏移動。

title: Word of the Day: tag (v) 鬼抓人
desc:
彰化縣二林鎮二林國小
The students play the playground game tag. 學生在操場上玩捉迷藏遊戲。

title: Word of the Day: fairy bread 彩糖麵包\仙子麵包 大園

title: Word of the Day: train (n) 火車

title: Word of the Day: multimeter (n) 三用電錶
desc:
彰化縣員林市崇實高工
The student is practicing using a multimeter to test electrical resistance. 學生正在練習使用萬用電表測試電阻。
A multimeter is a versatile tool that can measure voltage, current, and resistance in electrical circuits.
萬用電表是一種多功能工具，可以測量電路中的電壓、電流和電阻。
By using the multimeter, students can learn how to troubleshoot and diagnose electrical issues effectively. 
透過使用萬用電表，學生可以學習如何有效地排除和診斷電氣問題。

title: Word of the Day: control panel 控制箱
desc:
彰化縣員林市崇實高工
The students are practicing wiring the control panels. 
學生們正在練習控制面板接線。
For instance, they need to learn how to wire for switching between the main power supply and the backup generator. 
例如，他們需要學習如何接線以在主電源和備用發電機之間進行切換。
In case of a main power outage, they can seamlessly switch to the generator to maintain power. 
如果發生主電源停電，他們可以無縫切換到發電機來維持供電。
Another important aspect is ensuring electrical safety by installing devices that can cut off the power automatically if they detect any electrical faults.
另一個重要方面是透過安裝在檢測到任何電氣故障時自動切斷電源的裝置來確保電氣安全。

冷凍空調系統，包括冰箱和空調，需要徹底排除故障。
If there is an issue with the weak circuit, the compressor will not function properly. 
如果弱電路出現問題，壓縮機將無法正常運作。
They first eliminate any circuit issues before checking the compressor or refrigerant problems. 
他們首先排除任何電路問題，然後再檢查壓縮機或冷媒問題。

Performing chemical experiments can be quite hazardous, so it's essential to pay special attention to safety. 
進行化學實驗可能非常危險，因此必須特別注意安全。
Proper use of protective equipment and following safety protocols are crucial to prevent accidents. 
正確使用防護設備並遵守安全規程對於預防事故至關重要。
