desc:
彰化縣大村鄉村東國小
A teacher shows the students how to harvest moringa. 
老師向學生展示如何收穫辣木。
They make moringa soup, and the students enjoy it. 
他們製作辣木湯，學生都很喜歡。

title: Word of the Day: organize (v) 整理
desc:
彰化縣二水鄉源泉國小
The students are organizing their learning materials. 
學生們正在整理學習用品。
After organizing their learning materials, they are ready for the lesson. 
整理好學習用品後，他們就準備上課了。

title: Word of the Day: CPR 心肺復甦術
desc:
彰化縣田中鎮新民國小
Students are learning how to perform CPR. 
學生們正在學習如何做CPR。
They use CPR manikins to practice CPR. 
他們使用人體模型來練習做CPR。

title: Word of the Day: clean (n) 打掃
desc:
彰化縣埔鹽鄉大園國小
The students are cleaning the school in the morning. 
早上，學生們正在打掃學校。
While cleaning, they discover a bird's nest in a tree. 
在打掃時，他們在樹上發現了一個鳥巢。

title: Word of the Day: Heimlich maneuver 哈姆立克急救法
desc:
彰化縣田中鎮新民國小
Medical workers are instructing the students on how to perform the Heimlich maneuver. 
醫護人員正在指導學生如何進行哈姆立克急救法。
The Heimlich maneuver can save people from choking. 
哈姆立克急救法可以避免人們窒息。

title: Word of the Day: buffet (n) 自助餐
desc:
彰化縣二水鄉源泉國小
The students enjoy a buffet after the graduation ceremony. 
畢業典禮後，學生們享用自助餐。
They select and serve themselves the food they want from the buffet tables. 他們從自助餐桌上選擇並提供自己想要的食物。

title: Word of the Day: art club 美術社
desc:
彰化縣埔鹽鄉大園國小
Students in art club are learning to paint koi fish swimming in a lotus pond. 
美術社的學生正在學習畫荷塘裡遊動的錦鯉。
They learn a collage technique in the art club. 
他們在美術社學習拼貼技巧。

title: Word of the Day: dodgeball (n) 躲避球
desc:
彰化縣芳苑鄉路上國小
Dodgeball is a fast-paced game where the goal is to eliminate all the players from the opposing team. 
躲避球是一種節奏快速的遊戲，目標是將對手隊伍的所有選手淘汰出局。
In dodgeball, you eliminate an opposing player by hitting them with the ball. 在躲避球比賽中，你用球擊中對方的選手讓他們出局。

title: Word of the Day: glove puppet show 布袋戲
desc:
彰化縣員林市育英國小
The students are watching a glove puppet show. 
學生們正在觀看手套木偶表演。
The glove puppet show promotes anti-bullying. 
手套木偶戲宣導反霸凌。

title: Word of the Day: exchange activity 交流活動
desc:
彰化縣芬園鄉文德國小
The students are participating in a virtual exchange activity with people from the Philippines. 
學生們正在與菲律賓的學校參加虛擬交流活動。
The virtual exchange activity helps students understand the culture of other countries. 
虛擬交流活動有助於學生了解其他國家的文化。

title: Word of the Day: sandwich (n) 三明治
desc:
彰化縣埔鹽鄉大園國小
To celebrate Mother's Day, the school organizes an activity for students to make sandwiches. 
為了慶祝母親節，學校為學生舉辦了製作三明治的活動。
The students give the sandwiches they make to their mothers to show their appreciation. 
學生們把自己做的三明治送給媽媽，以表達他們的謝意。

title: Word of the Day: shape (n) 形狀
desc:
彰化縣埔鹽鄉大園國小
The students cut shapes out of colored paper and paste them onto a sheet. 學生們用色紙剪出形狀並將其貼在一張紙上。
This activity helps them learn important shape concepts. 
這項活動可以幫助他們學習重要的形狀概念。

title: Word of the Day: photo frame 相框
desc:
彰化縣埔鹽鄉大園國小
The students are making photo frames 
學生們正在製作相框。
They use dried flowers to decorate their photo frames. 
他們用乾燥花來裝飾他們的相框。

title: Word of the Day: homework (n) 家庭作業
desc:
彰化縣埔鹽鄉大園國小
The students are quietly doing their homework in the classroom. 
學生們正在教室裡安靜地做作業。
The homework helps them review what they have learned in class. 
作業幫助他們複習在課堂上學到的知識。

title: Word of the Day: skit (n) 小品
desc:
彰化縣竹塘鄉竹塘國小
The students are performing a skit. 
學生們正在表演短劇。
The skit aims to encourage students not to smoke or chew betel nuts. 
該短劇旨在鼓勵學生不要吸煙或咀嚼檳榔。

title: Word of the Day: write (v) 寫作
desc:
彰化縣埔鹽鄉大園國小
The teacher is guiding the students on how to write. 
老師正在指導學生如何寫作。
Writing helps improve the students' communication skills. 
寫作有助於提升學生的溝通能力。

title: Word of the Day: vocabulary contest 詞彙競賽
desc:
彰化縣彰化市平和國小
The school is hosting an English vocabulary contest. 
學校正在舉辦英語詞彙比賽。
In the vocabulary contest, students are required to use tablets to submit their answers. 
在詞彙競賽中，學生需要使用平板電腦提交答案。

title: Word of the Day: storytelling (n) 說故事
desc:
彰化縣福興鄉永豐國小
The students take turns practicing storytelling in class.  
在課堂上，同學們輪流練習說故事。
Storytelling can help them feel more confident with speaking. 
說故事能幫助學生對於講話更有自信。

title: Word of the Day: distance learning 遠距學習
desc:
彰化縣社頭鄉湳雅國小
Students are studying English through distance learning. 
學生透過遠距學習學習英語。
In the distance learning program, they learn about fruits. 
在遠距學習計劃中，他們了解水果。

title: Word of the Day: award (n) 獎
desc:
彰化縣埔心鄉埔心國中
Each student receives an award. 
每個學生都接受頒獎。
The principal gives each student their award. 
校長頒發獎項給每位學生。

title: Word of the Day: drop off 放下
desc:
彰化縣芳苑鄉路上國小
Parents drive their kids to school and drop them off at the school gate.  
家長開車送孩子去學校，然後把他們送到學校門口。
Some parents drop off their kids on scooters. 
有些父母用踏板車送孩子。

title: Word of the Day: cake (n) 蛋糕
desc:
彰化縣員林市育英國小
In art class, the teacher is teaching the children to make cakes out of lightweight clay.  
美術課上，老師正在教孩子們用輕質黏土製作蛋糕。
The cakes they create are to be given to their mothers on Mother's Day. 
他們製作的蛋糕將在母親節送給母親。

title: Word of the Day: CPR 心肺復甦術
desc:
彰化縣員林市育英國小
Students are learning how to perform CPR. 
學生們正在學習如何做CPR。
They use CPR manikins to practice CPR. 
他們使用人體模型來練習做CPR。

title: Word of the Day: martial arts 武術
desc:
彰化縣福興鄉永豐國小
The students are showcasing their martial arts skills. 
學生們正在展示他們的武術技巧。
They perform different martial arts moves. 
他們表演不同的武術動作。

title: Word of the Day: Go (n) 圍棋
desc:
彰化縣員林市育英國小
The students play Go in class. 
學生們在課堂上下圍棋。
They take turns while they play Go. 
他們輪流下圍棋。

title: Word of the Day: plush ball 毛毛球
desc:
彰化縣福興鄉永豐國小
Students are creating art using plush balls.  
學生們正在使用毛絨球創作藝術品。
They are arranging the plush balls to form beautiful patterns. 
他們正在把毛絨球排列成美麗的圖案。

title: Word of the Day: game (n) 遊戲
desc:
彰化縣埔鹽鄉大園國小
The students are outside playing a game.  
學生們正在外面玩遊戲。
In the game, one person is "it" and calls out "one, two, three, freeze." 
遊戲中，一個人就是“鬼”，當鬼的人會喊出“一、二、三，木頭人（不要動）。”

title: Word of the Day: rice shaker 米樂器
desc:
彰化縣北斗鎮萬來國小
Students use empty plastic bottles and rice to make a rice shaker. 
學生們用空塑膠瓶和米製作搖米樂器。
Once completed, the rice shaker can be used to keep the rhythm for a song. 米樂器完成後，它使得歌曲有節奏感。

title: Word of the Day: lawn (n) 草坪
desc:
彰化縣埔鹽鄉大園國小
A worker is mowing the lawn at the school. 
一名工人正在學校修剪草坪。
He pushes a four-wheeled lawnmower across the lawn, back and forth. 
他推著四輪割草機在草坪上來回移動。

title: Word of the Day: art class 美術課
desc:
彰化縣埔鹽鄉大園國小
In art class, students draw underwater worlds. 
在美術課上，學生畫海底世界。
Students paint various sea creatures in art class. 
學生在美術課上畫各種海洋生物。

title: Word of the Day: daily routine 例行工作
desc:
彰化縣埔鹽鄉大園國小
The class follows a daily routine 
班級學生正在做例行工作。
One daily routine is to sweep, mop and wipe. 
例行工作有掃地、拖地、擦拭等等事項。

title: Word of the Day: drug (n) 毒品
desc:
彰化縣北斗鎮萬來國小
An Anti-Drug Education Vehicle visits the school to promote anti-drug education. 
反毒教育車到訪學校宣傳禁毒教育。
Students learn about the harmful effects of drugs by watching videos and playing games. 
學生透過觀看影片和玩遊戲來了解毒品的有害影響。

title: Word of the Day: bouquet (n) 花束
desc:
彰化縣福興鄉永豐國小
Students are making paper bouquets in class. 
學生在課堂上製作紙花束。
These bouquets are a way to express gratitude to their mothers. 
這些花束是表達對母親感激之情的一種方式。

title: Word of the Day: 3D movie 3D電影
desc:
彰化縣埤頭鄉芙朝國小
Students watch a 3D movie outside. 
同學們在戶外觀賞3D立體電影。
They put on their 3D glasses to watch the 3D movie. 
他們戴上3D眼鏡來觀賞3D立體電影。

title: Word of the Day: area (n) 面積
desc:
彰化縣員林市育英國小
Area is a number that describes a 2D object's size. 
面積是描述 2D 物件大小的數字。
In math class, the smart students use paper to count the area of objects. 
在數學課上，聰明的學生用紙來計算物體的面積。

title: Word of the Day: clay (n) 黏土
desc:
彰化縣竹塘鄉竹塘國小
The students are using clay to make their own art. 
同學們用黏土創作他們自己的作品。
Clay is very soft, so the kids can mold it into different shapes. 
黏土很柔軟，所以小朋友可以將它塑造成不同的形狀。

title: Word of the Day: marathon (n) 馬拉松
desc:
彰化縣社頭鄉湳雅國小
Students are training for the marathon. 
學生們正在為馬拉松訓練。
They warm up and jog around the school track to prepare for the marathon. 他們在學校跑道上熱身並慢跑，為馬拉松做準備。

title: Word of the Day: museum (n) 博物館
desc:
彰化縣福興鄉西勢國小
The school takes the students on an exciting and educational field trip to a museum. 
學校帶領學生到一個博物館做戶外教學。
The museum has a variety of exhibits about Taiwanese history for visitors to enjoy. 
這個博物館有很多關於台灣歷史的展覽讓遊客欣賞。

title: Word of the Day: flap book  翻蓋書 、翻翻書
desc:
彰化縣員林市育英國小
The students show each other their DIY flap books. 
學生們互相展示他們DIY的翻蓋書。
Under the flap book's flap is a hidden picture like a car, a dog or a tree. 
翻蓋書的翻蓋下方隱藏著一張圖片，例如汽車、狗或樹。

title: Word of the Day: reading 閱讀
desc:
彰化縣社頭鄉湳雅國小
Look at the students. They’re all reading quietly. 
看看這群學生，他們閱讀時多麼安靜啊！
Reading often can help you improve your vocabulary and learn many new things. 
閱讀經常可以讓你增加字彙並且學到很多新知。

title: Word of the Day: national flag 國旗
desc:
彰化縣北斗鎮萬來國小
The students raise and lower Taiwan's national flag. 
學生們在升、降台灣國旗。
The national flag is red and blue with a white sun. 
國旗為紅藍相間，帶有白色太陽。

title: Word of the Day: salute (v) 敬禮
desc:
彰化縣芳苑鄉路上國小
During the flag-raising ceremony, students have to salute the national flag. 在升旗儀式上，學生必須向國旗敬禮。
The way elementary students salute is different from the way adults do. 小學生敬禮的方式與大人不同。

title: Word of the Day: jump (v) 跳躍
desc:
彰化縣芳苑鄉路上國小
Students practice jumping exercises. 
學生練習跳躍練習。
Jumping helps keep them physically active." 跳躍有助於他們保持身體活躍。

title: Word of the Day: activity (n) 活動
desc:
彰化縣溪州鄉三條國小
Two American English teachers visit the school to help improve students' English by designing interesting activities.  
兩位美國英語老師到訪學校，透過設計有趣的活動幫助學生提升英語能力。
These activities, such as drawing and doing origami, make the English lessons fun for the students. 
繪畫和摺紙等活動讓學生的英語課變得有趣。

title: Word of the Day: mung bean soup 綠豆湯
desc:
彰化縣員林市育英國小
The students each have a bowl of mung bean soup. 
學生們每人有一碗綠豆湯。
They freeze the mung bean soup to eat later. 
他們把綠豆湯冷凍起來以後再吃。

title: Word of the Day: snack (n) 點心
desc:
彰化縣芳苑鄉路上國小
During snack time, the students have milk, cookies, and brown sugar cake. 點心時間，學生有牛奶、餅乾和紅糖蛋糕。
These snacks give them more energy for the rest of the day. 
這些零食讓他們在一天剩下的時間裡有更多的能量。

title: Word of the Day: Dragon Boat Festival (n) 端午節
desc:
彰化縣社頭鄉湳雅國小
Students gather in the auditorium to learn about the Dragon Boat Festival in English. 
學生們聚集在禮堂，用英語了解端午節。
The teacher teaches the students English vocabulary related to the Dragon Boat Festival. 
老師教導學生與端午節相關的英語詞彙。

title: Word of the Day: event (n) 活動
desc:
彰化縣竹塘鄉竹塘國小
The school holds a visual impairment experience event.  
學校舉辦視障體驗活動。
During the event, students and teachers experience the life of a blind person. 活動期間，學生和老師體驗盲人的生活。

title: Word of the Day: letter (n) 字母
desc:
彰化縣社頭鄉湳雅國小
In English class, children play a game where they fill in missing letters in English words. 
在英語課上，孩子們玩一個遊戲，填寫英語單字中缺少的字母。
The first one to complete the letters raises their small whiteboard to show the teacher. 
第一個完成字母的學生舉起小白板向老師展示。

title: Word of the Day: fountain (n) 噴水池
desc:
彰化縣大村鄉村東國小
The school has a fountain that makes the campus look nice. 
學校有一個噴泉，讓校園看起來很漂亮。
The fountain is not only pretty, but also gives the students a place to relax. 噴泉不僅漂亮，而且給學生們提供了一個放鬆的地方。

title: Word of the Day: scissors (n) 剪刀
desc:
彰化縣伸港鄉大同國小
Students carefully use scissors to cut shapes. 
學生小心翼翼地用剪刀剪出形狀。
Students use scissors to cut paper into pieces or strips. 
學生用剪刀將紙剪成碎片或條狀。

title: Word of the Day: drug (n) 毒品
desc:
彰化縣社頭鄉湳雅國小
An Anti-Drug Education Vehicle visits the school to promote anti-drug education. 
反毒教育車到訪學校宣傳禁毒教育。
Students learn about the harmful effects of drugs by watching videos and playing games. 
學生透過觀看影片和玩遊戲來了解毒品的有害影響。

title: Word of the Day: guest (n) 客人
desc:
彰化縣溪州鄉三條國小
The principal is hosting a guest from the United States. 
校長正在接待一位來自美國的客人。
In Taiwan, principals usually serve tea and snacks to their guests. 
在台灣，校長通常會為客人奉茶和點心。

title: Word of the Day: cards (n) 撲克牌
desc:
彰化縣福興鄉永豐國小
The students play cards in class. 
學生們在課堂上玩牌。
They all look at their cards before they make their move. 
他們在出牌之前都會先看自己的牌。

title: Word of the Day: juggle (v) 雜耍
desc:
彰化縣員林市育英國小
The students learn how to juggle. 
學生學習如何玩雜耍。
Each student in class practices how to juggle. 
班上的每個學生都練習如何耍雜技。

title: Word of the Day: hoop (n) 環
desc:
彰化縣芳苑鄉路上國小
The students try to throw hoops around toys to win the prize. 
學生們嘗試在玩套圈圈遊戲來贏得獎品。
If the hoop goes around the toy, the students keep the prize. 
如果圓環套中玩具，學生就可以保留獎品。

title: Word of the Day: Indonesian culture 印尼文化
desc:
彰化縣芳苑鄉路上國小
The students learn about Indonesian culture in class. 
學生們在課堂上了解印尼文化。
This is the first time for students to learn about Indonesian culture.
這是學生第一次了解印尼文化。

title: Word of the Day: weathervane (n) 風向標
desc:
彰化縣竹塘鄉竹塘國小
The students use a weathervane to check the direction of the wind. 
學生使用風向標來檢查風向。
They go outside to use their weathervanes. 
他們到外面去利用風向標。

title: Word of the Day: lunchroom (n) 食堂
desc:
彰化縣芳苑鄉路上國小
Teachers and students go to the lunchroom to eat lunch. 
老師和學生到食堂吃午餐。
They eat with their friends in the lunchroom. 
他們和朋友在食堂吃飯。

title: Word of the Day: glue (n) 膠水
desc:
彰化縣伸港鄉大同國小
With glue, students can make all sorts of things. 有了膠水，學生可以製作各種各樣的東西。
Glue helps students stick together paper and cardboard, and repair books. 膠水可以幫助學生將紙張和修復書籍。

title: Word of the Day: science class 自然科學課
desc:
彰化縣員林市育英國小
The students learn about the process of freezing water in science class. 學生在科學課上了解水結冰的過程。
They make ice in science class to learn how water freezes. 
他們在科學課上製冰以了解水如何結冰。

title: Word of the Day: cross (v) 穿越
desc:
彰化縣伸港鄉大同國小
The students cross the street to get to school. 同學們越過馬路到學校去。
They have to be careful when crossing the street. 他們在穿越馬路的時候必須很小心。

title: Word of the Day: CPR 心肺復甦術
desc:
彰化縣溪州鄉大莊國小
Students are learning how to perform CPR. 學生們正在學習如何做CPR。
They use CPR manikins to practice CPR. 他們使用人體模型來練習做CPR。

title: Word of the Day: principal (n) 校長
desc:

彰化縣北斗鎮萬來國小
Students visit various stations around the school for a series of fun games 學生們參觀學校周圍的各個車站，進行一系列有趣的遊戲
Each station presents a task for the students to complete.每個站都會提供學生一個需要完成的任務。

title: Word of the Day: Mother's Day cards 母親節卡片
desc:
彰化縣北斗鎮萬來國小
These students are making Mother's Day cards for their mothers.這些學生正在為他們的母親製作母親節卡片。
They draw pictures and put a message on their Mother's Day cards.他們畫畫並在母親節卡片上留言。

title: Word of the Day: performer (n) 表演者
desc:
彰化縣彰化市中山國小
The performers show the students how to do a dance.表演者向學生展示如何跳舞。
The students follow along to the dance of the performers on stage.學生們跟隨舞台上表演者的舞蹈。

title: Word of the Day: brush (n) 刷牙
desc:
彰化縣伸港鄉大同國小
The students brush their teeth after lunch.同學們在吃過午餐後刷牙。
They brush their teeth at the outdoor sink.他們在外面的洗手台刷牙。

title: Word of the Day: cabbage (n) 高麗菜
desc:
彰化縣伸港鄉大同國小
The students go to the farm to harvest cabbage. 學生們去農場收白菜。
The teacher helps them harvest the cabbage.老師幫助他們收高麗菜。

彰化縣北斗鎮萬來國小
Students are learning how to perform CPR.學生們正在學習如何做CPR。
They use CPR manikins to practice CPR.他們使用人體模型來練習做CPR。

彰化縣田中鎮三潭國小
The students use dice for a textbook activity.學生使用骰子進行教科書活動。
They have to answer questions according to the number they roll on the dice. 他們必須根據骰子上擲出的數字回答問題。

desc:

The students clean the restroom.學生打掃廁所。
They use brooms and mops to clean the restroom.他們用掃帚和拖把來打掃浴室。

彰化縣伸港鄉大同國小
The students color refrigerator magnets in class. 學生在課堂上為冰箱貼上色。
The refirgerator magnets are in the shape of dogs.冰箱貼是狗的形狀。

desc:
彰化縣田中鎮三潭國小
The students pick the lettuce growing on the balcony. 學生們採摘陽台上生長的生菜。
They cut and clean the lettuce leaves.他們切割並清潔生菜葉。

desc:
彰化縣立信義國中小
A musician from abroad is leading a music workshop at the school.一位外國的音樂家在學校主持音樂研習會。
Students learn to play instruments and sing under the guidance of the musician.學生在音樂家的指導下學習演奏樂器和唱歌。

彰化縣田中鎮三潭國小
The teacher and the students dance to the music.學生們跟隨著音樂節奏跳舞。

The students have to be careful when road running because there are many cars. 由於汽車很多，學生在路上跑步時必須小心。

title: Word of the Day: school band (n) 學校樂隊
desc:
彰化縣彰化市中山國小
The school band provides music for the flag-raising ceremony. 學校樂隊為升旗儀式演奏音樂。

彰化縣北斗鎮萬來國小

彰化縣伸港鄉大同國小
On rainy days, people use umbrellas to shield themselves from the rain. 下雨天時，人們用雨傘擋雨。
When you leave your house on a rainy day, don't forget to bring your umbrella!下雨天時，當你離家時，不要忘記帶雨傘。

desc:
彰化縣北斗鎮萬來國小

desc:
彰化縣田中鎮三潭國小
The students are playing dodgeball. 學生們正在玩躲避球。
Dodgeball is a popular school game. 躲避球是一種流行的學校比賽。

desc:
彰化縣北斗鎮萬來國小
Students are having fun with an inflatable caterpillar on the playground. 學生們開開心心地在操場上玩充氣毛毛蟲。

彰化縣彰化市中山國小

彰化縣員林市育英國小

Students spend a lot of time and effort preparing for their midterm exams. 同學們花很多時間與精力準備期中考。

title: Word of the Day: sing (v) 唱歌

彰化縣二水鄉源泉國小

彰化縣二水鄉源泉國小

title: Word of the Day: field trip (n) 校外教學

title: Word of the Day: recorder (n) 直笛

The recorder is the first musical instrument that many students learn.直笛是很多學生學的第一項樂器。

Students are having fun with an inflatable caterpillar on the playground. 學生們開開心心地在操場上玩充氣毛毛蟲。

彰化縣溪湖鎮湖西國小
The school has an after-school English club. 學校在放學後有個英文社團。
The foreign English teacher is teaching kids about Christmas in the club. 外國老師在社團中指導學生有關聖誕節的知識。

title: Word of the Day professional development 專業進修
desc:
彰化縣溪湖鎮湖西國小
In Taiwan, all schools have professional development sessions for teachers. 在台灣，所有學校都有教師專業進修課程。
Teachers learn new skills and strategies during their professional development sessions. 在專業進修課程中，老師可以學到新的教學技巧與策略。

title: Word of the Day: professional development 專業進修
desc:
彰化縣秀水鄉明正國小

Teachers learn new skills and strategies during their professional development sessions. 在專業訓練課程中，老師可以學到新的教學技巧與策略。

title: Word of the Day: swing (v) 盪鞦韆
desc:
彰化縣和美鎮和仁國小
During recess, students like to swing.下課時，學生們喜歡玩盪鞦韆。
You kick your legs up and down to swing.盪鞦韆時，你的腳要上下踢動。

desc:
台中市清水區大秀國小

The kids are having fun playing on the seesaw.  小朋友在蹺蹺板上玩得很快樂。

desc:
彰化縣溪湖鎮湖西國小

They are focused on writing neatly. 他們很專注把字寫工整。

desc:
彰化縣溪湖鎮湖西國小

The students are having a lot of fun playing soccer.  同學們正享受踢足球的樂趣。

彰化縣秀水鄉 明正國小

desc:
彰化縣溪湖鎮湖西國小

Make sure to wash your hands with soap and water before eating.  確定在吃東西之前要用香皂和水來洗手。

desc:
彰化縣溪湖鎮湖西國小

Students in Taiwan sweep the school grounds, keeping them clean and neat.         台灣的學生打掃校園，保持校園的乾淨整齊。

title: Word of the Day mop 拖地
desc:
彰化縣人師教育協會
Kevin mops the floor. Kevin在拖地。

Recess is when kids can play outside, run around, and have fun. 下課時間是孩子們可以在外面玩耍、跑來跑去、玩得開心的時候。

balance 平衡

Word of the Day-basket (n) 籃子

In Taiwan, all schools have professional development sessions for teachers. 台灣所有學校都有老師專業進修的課程。 
Teachers learn new skills and strategies during their professional development sessions. 老師在專業進修課程中學習新技能與教學策略。

title: Word of the Day: cut out 裁剪

彰化縣埤頭鄉中和國小

title: Word of the Day: bell (n) 鈴

彰化縣埤頭鄉中和國小
If a player knows the answer, he or she rings the bell to let the teacher know. 如果選手知道答案，他可以按鈴讓老師知道。

彰化縣人師教育協會
This museum has antique trains on display. 這個博物館展示一些老火車。

title: Word of the Day: laminate (v) 護貝

desc:
彰化縣人師教育協會
On the weekends, many people go to the bowling alley to bowl. 週末時，很多人上保齡球館打保齡球。
People have fun at the bowling alley with their families. 人們和家人在保齡球館共度快樂的時光。

title: Word of the Day: color in 著色
desc:
彰化縣埤頭鄉中和國小
The students use pencils to draw animals, and then they color them in. 同學們用鉛筆畫動物，然後再著色。
They use markers to color in their drawings. 他們用彩色筆幫他們畫的圖案著色。

彰化縣人師教育協會

If you don't have a car, you can use public transportation instead. 如果你沒有車子，你可以使用大眾運輸。

彰化縣人師教育協會

title: Word of the Day: honor guard (n) 儀隊

彰化縣人師教育協會

title: Word of the Day: brush your teeth 刷牙

A marina is a place for docking boats. 碼頭是船隻停泊的地方。
You can go to the marina if you want to see the boats and enjoy the beautiful scenery. 如果你想欣賞船隻與美麗的風景，你可以去碼頭。

title: Word of the Day: hardcover book (n) 精裝書
desc:
彰化縣溪州鄉溪州國小
This group of students takes a field trip to a special library that has many rare hardcover books. 這群學生的校外教學是參觀一間特別的圖書館，這間圖書館有很多稀奇的精裝書。
The students have a chance to sit in the library and read some of the hardcover books. 同學們有機會坐在圖書館閱讀一些精裝書。

title: Word of the Day: paint pouring (n) 流體畫
desc:
彰化縣田中鎮明禮國小
Students and their parents do paint pouring together. 同學們和他們的家長一起創作流體畫。
Paint pouring uses acrylic paint to make a design. 流體畫使用塑膠彩來設計圖形。

title: Word of the Day: popcorn (n) 爆米花
desc:
彰化縣溪州鄉溪州國小
This machine can be used to make popcorn from scratch. 這台機器可以用來從頭開始做爆米花。
The teacher fills the students' bowls with the freshly-made popcorn. 老師將剛做好的爆米花盛到學生的碗中。

title: Word of the Day: storytelling 講故事
desc:
彰化縣溪州鄉溪州國小
The students practice storytelling with a partner. 同學和一個搭擋練習說故事。
Storytelling can help students feel more confident with speaking. 說故事能幫助學生對於講話更有自信。

title: Word of the Day: kindergarten (n) 幼兒園
desc:
彰化縣福興鄉育新國小
Children play different games in kindergarten. 小朋友在幼兒園玩不同的遊戲。
In kindergarten, students learn basic skills. 學生在幼兒園學習基本的技能。

title: Word of the Day: run (v) 跑步
desc:
彰化縣福興鄉育新國小
The students are running at the track. 學生們在跑道上跑步。
Running is good exercise and students do it every day. 跑步是很好的運動，學生們每天都在跑步。

title: Word of the Day: technology (n) 科技
desc:
彰化縣二水鄉源泉國小
Technology is an important part of modern education. 
科技在現代教育扮演重要的角色。
This teacher is using technology in his classroom, letting his students use tablets to learn English. 
這位老師正在課堂上使用科技，讓他的學生使用平板學習英語。

title: Word of the Day: puzzle (n) 拼圖
desc:
彰化縣福興鄉育新國小
The students are putting the puzzle together. 學生們正在拼圖。
They are organzing the puzzle pieces to put it together. 他們正在將拼圖片組在一起。

title: Word of the Day: exercise (n) 運動
desc:
彰化縣溪州鄉溪州國小
The teacher leads the students in a group exercise. 老師引領學生做團體的運動。
Each student does an exercise running around the cones. 每個學生要繞行三角錐做運動。

title: Word of the Day: graduation (n) 畢業典禮
desc:
彰化縣二林鎮廣興國小
Students put on different performances at the school's graduation. 同學們在學校畢業典禮中表演很多不同的節目。
Students, staff, and family members eat together at the graduation banquet. 學生、教職員工與家長在畢業典禮的餐會中一起用餐。

title: Word of the Day: karate (n) 空手道
desc:
彰化縣二水鄉源泉國小
Karate is a form of martial arts. 空手道是武術的一種形式。
The coach is teaching the moves in karate. 教練正在教空手道的動作。

title: Word of the Day: board games (n) 桌遊
desc:
彰化縣溪州鄉溪州國小
The kids are playing board games in class.
孩子們在課堂上玩桌遊。
You don’t need to play on the computer to have fun – you can play board games instead!
您不需要在電腦上玩就可以玩得開心——您可以玩桌遊！

title: Word of the Day: radish (n) 蘿蔔
desc:
彰化縣芳苑鄉路上國小
A radish is a root vegetable, meaning it grows underground. 蘿蔔是塊根植物，意思是它長在地底下。
The students are harvesting radishes from the garden. 同學們正在菜園採收蘿蔔。

title: Word of the Day: warm-up (n) 暖身
desc:
彰化縣田中鎮三潭國小
The students do warm-ups to get ready to run. 學生們做熱身準備跑步。
Warm-ups loosen the muscles and reduce the chance of injuries. 熱身可以放鬆肌肉並減少受傷的機會。

title: Word of the Day: puzzle (n) 智力遊戲
desc:
彰化市彰興國中
A puzzle is a type of game, toy, or problem that you have to use your intelligence to solve. 智力遊戲是一種遊戲或者是謎題，必須使用智力來解決。
The students are trying to solve the Chinese Rings, a puzzle that has been around since ancient times. 同學們試著解九連環，這是一種從古流傳至今的智力遊戲。

title: Word of the Day: take a walk 散步
desc:
彰化縣人師教育協會
The father and daughter take a walk at night. 
父女倆晚上散步。
Taking a walk is a good way to exercise. 
散步是一種很好的運動。

title: Word of the Day: slideshow (n) 投影
desc:
彰化縣二水鄉二水國小
A slideshow is a helpful teaching tool that teachers can use in class. 
投影是教師可以在課堂上使用的一種有用的教學工具。
This teacher is using a slideshow that contains text and images to teach his students English. 
這位老師正在使用包含文本和圖像的投影來教他的學生英語。

title: Word of the Day: dance routine (n) 舞蹈動作
desc:
彰化縣大村鄉村東國小
The girls work very hard, rehearsing their dance routines with their instructor. 這群女孩子很認真和老師排練他們的舞步。
In this dance routine, there are some parts where the girls dance in pairs. 這套舞步有些部分需要兩個女孩子共舞。

title: Word of the Day: color (n) 顏色
desc:
彰化縣大村鄉村東國小
Some pieces of art aren't finished until the artist has added color. 有些藝術作品必須等藝術家上好顏色才算完成。
These students are using markers and colored pencils to add color to their drawings. 這些學生用馬克筆與色鉛筆來為他們的圖畫上顏色。

title: Word of the Day: dessert (n) 甜點
desc:
彰化縣埤頭鄉芙朝國小
A dessert is a sweet dish that you often eat at the end of a meal. 點心是飯後吃的甜食。
The students are making dumplings with a sweet filling—a special dessert for the Dragon Boat Festival. 同學們在做冰粽，冰粽裡頭有甜的餡料，這是端午節的特別點心。

title: Word of the Day: graduation (n) 畢業典禮
desc:
彰化縣大村鄉村上國小
A graduation is a ceremony students who have completed the highest grade level at their school. 畢業典禮是學生在學校完成最高年級學業時的一個儀式。
At a graduation, students often receive awards, get their diplomas, and give speeches. 在畢業典禮中，學生通常會得到獎勵、領取畢業證書，並且有畢業生代表致詞。

title: Word of the Day: Earth (n) 地球
desc:
彰化縣溪州鄉僑義國小
Earth is the planet we live on. 地球是我們居住的星球。
On Earth Day, the teacher shows her students ways to take care of the Earth. 在世界地球日當天，老師為學生展示愛護地球的各種方式。

title: Word of the Day: soap (n) 肥皂
desc:
彰化縣芳苑鄉路上國小
The students combine wax and herbs to make soap. 同學們將蠟與一種藥草混合起來製作肥皂。
The soap is put into molds to make different shapes. 肥皂被放入模具呈現出不同形狀。

title: Word of the Day: red bean cake (n) 紅豆糕
desc:
彰化縣埤頭鄉芙朝國小
The volunteers show how to make red bean cake. 志工示範如何製作紅豆糕。
The students help prepare their red bean cakes. 同學們協助準備製作他們的紅豆糕。

title: Word of the Day: dragon boat race (n) 龍舟比賽
desc:
彰化縣鹿港鎮鹿鳴國中雙語資源網
https://luming.mycultureconnect.org/

The students practice for the dragon boat race. 同學們為龍舟賽做練習。
The paddlers have to work together to win a dragon boat race. 划槳手必須同心協力才能贏得龍舟賽。

title: Word of the Day: tea ceremony (n) 茶道
desc:
彰化縣芳苑鄉芳苑國小
The students practice performing a tea ceremony. 同學們在練習茶道。
You have to pay attention to details during a tea ceremony. 進行茶道時，你必須注意細節。

title: Word of the Day: partner (n) 伙伴
desc:
彰化縣埤頭鄉芙朝國小
Students work with their partners to finish the worksheets. 同學們和他們的伙伴一起完成學習單。
Students often do partner work in school. 學生在學校經常得和伙伴合作完成任務。

title: Word of the Day: sign (n) 標牌
desc:
彰化縣芳苑鄉路上國小
The students make bilingual signs. 同學們製作雙語的標牌。
The teacher shows how to seal their signs. 老師示範如何為標牌上漆。

title: Word of the Day: book (n) 書
desc:
彰化縣北斗鎮北斗國中
The students browse the boxes of books. 同學們在瀏覽紙箱內的書。
Each student can pick one English book to keep. 每個學生都能為自己挑選一本英文書。

title: Word of the Day: phonics (n) 自然發音
desc:
彰化縣溪州鄉僑義國小
The teacher reviews phonics in class. 老師在課堂上複習自然發音。
The students play a game to practice their phonics skills. 同學們玩一個遊戲來練習他們自然發音的技巧。

title: Word of the Day: money (n) 錢
desc:
彰化縣埤頭鄉芙朝國小
Students play a game to practice counting money. 同學們玩一個遊戲來練習數錢。
Counting money is an important skill to have. 數錢是一個很重要的生活技能。

title: Word of the Day: station (n) 站
desc:
彰化縣二水鄉二水國小
Students go to different stations around the gym. 體育館內設立不同的站讓同學造訪。
Each station has an activity to help students practice speaking English. 每個站都有一個活動幫助學生練習說英語。

title: Word of the Day: baby corn (n) 玉米筍
desc:
彰化縣人師教育協會
The children peel the baby corn. 小朋友在剝玉米筍。
Baby corn is yummy to eat. 玉米筍很好吃。

title: Word of the Day: story listening (n) 聽故事
desc:
彰化縣北斗鎮北斗國中
The teacher models story listening to his students. 這位老師為同學示範「聽故事」的教學方法。
Story listening is a strategy to help students comprehend what they hear. 「聽故事」是幫助學生理解英文的一個策略。

title: Word of the Day: garden (n) 花園
desc:
彰化縣鹿港鎮鹿鳴國中
The school has its own garden where students can learn how to take care of plants. 
學校有自己的花園，學生可以在那裡學習如何照顧植物。
The students get to work outside, pulling weeds and watering the plants to take care of the garden. 
學生們開始在戶外工作，拔除雜草並澆灌植物以照料花園。

title: Word of the Day: prepare (v) 準備
desc:
彰化縣二水鄉二水國小
The students prepare for a competition where they have to memorize and recite texts in Chinese and Taiwanese. 學生們準備參加一場比賽，他們必須用中文和台語背誦與朗讀文本。
The teachers coach the students to help them prepare for the big event. 老師指導學生，幫助他們為此重要比賽做準備。

title: Word of the Day: dictionary (n) 辭典
desc:
彰化縣伸港鄉新港國小
The students use their iPads to access an online dictionary. 同學們用他們的iPad上網查線上字典。
You can use a dictionary to look up unknown words. 你可以用字典查生字。

title: Word of the Day: archery (n) 射箭
desc:
彰化縣田中鎮三潭國小
The students practice archery, using bows to shoot arrows at targets. 
學生們練習射箭，用弓把箭射向目標。
The goal of archery is to hit your target with an arrow. 
射箭的目標是用箭射中目標

title: Word of the Day: drumstick (n) 鼓槌
desc:
彰化縣和美鎮和美國小
 The performers are using wooden drumsticks to beat the drums. 表演者用木製的槌打鼓。
Each drummer has their own pair of drumsticks. 每個鼓手都有自己的一對鼓槌。

title: Word of the Day: listen (v) 聽
desc:
彰化縣伸港鄉新港國小
The students listen and write down the words they hear. 同學們將聽到的單字寫下來。
You have to listen carefully during the test. 在測驗時，你必須很仔細地聆聽。

title: Word of the Day: pump (n) 打氣筒
desc:
彰化縣人師教育協會
The girl is using a pump to fill the bicycle tires with air. 這個小女孩正在用打氣筒幫腳踏車的輪胎打氣。
She uses the pump by stepping on the pedal, causing the tire to fill with air. 她踩著打氣筒的踏板讓輪胎充氣。

title: Word of the Day: order (n) 順序
desc:
彰化市平和國小
In this contest, students are shown English words with their letters in the wrong order.  在這場比賽中，同學們給的是字母順序錯誤的單字。
The students have to put the letters in the correct order and spell the words. 同學們必須把字母順序調整正確並拼出單字。

title: Word of the Day: pray (v) 祈福
desc:
彰化市彰興國中
The school staff is at the temple to pray. 學校教職人員在廟裡祈福。
The staff prays for good luck for their students on their exams. 教職人員為他們學生的考試祈福。

title: Word of the Day mouthwash 漱口水
desc:
彰化縣芳苑鄉路上國小
The teacher is giving her students mouthwash to gargle with. 這位老師給學生漱口水漱口。
Gargling with mouthwash helps keep your teeth healthy. 用漱口水漱口可以保持牙齒健康。

title: Word of the Day: graduate (v) 畢業
desc:
彰化縣鹿鳴國中雙語資源網
https://luming.mycultureconnect.org/

After several years of hard work, these students are graduating from junior high school. 在努力了幾年後，這些學生從國中畢業了。
After they graduate from junior high school, the students can go on to attend high school. 從國中畢業後，同學們便可以上高中。

title: Word of the Day: orchestra (n) 樂團
desc:
彰化縣鹿鳴國中雙語資源網
https://luming.mycultureconnect.org/

An orchestra is a large group of musicians that play music together. 樂團是由一群聚在一起演奏的音樂家所組成的。
The conductor is conducting the musicians in the orchestra. 這位指揮正在指揮樂團的音樂家演奏音樂。

title: Word of the Day: race (v) 賽跑
desc:
彰化縣田中鎮三潭國小
The students line up on the line to race each other. 同學們在起跑線排隊準備賽跑。
Before the students race on the track, they stretch their legs. 在跑道上賽跑前，他們做腳部伸展運動。

title: Word of the Day: dodgeball (n) 躲避球
desc:
彰化市東芳國小
Dodgeball is a fast-paced game where the goal is to eliminate all the players from the opposing team. 躲避球是一種節奏快速的遊戲，目標是將對手隊伍的所有選手淘汰出局。
In dodgeball, you eliminate an opposing player by hitting them with the ball. 在躲避球比賽中，你用球擊中對方的選手讓他們出局。

title: Word of the Day: basketball court (n) 籃球場
desc:
彰化縣芳苑鄉芳苑國小
The kids are playing on the basketball court. 小朋友在籃球上打籃球。
Most basketball courts have a hoop on each side. 大部分的籃球場兩邊各有一個籃框。

title: Word of the Day: leaf (n) 葉子
desc:
彰化縣芳苑鄉芳苑國小

A leaf is a part of a plant that can absorb sunlight and convert it into energy. 葉子是植物的ㄧ部分，可以吸收陽光並將其轉換成能量。
The teacher brought different types of leaves to show the students. 老師帶好幾種不同的葉子展示給學生看。

title: Word of the Day: ballot (n) 選票
desc:
彰化縣二水鄉二水國小
First the students go into the voting booth to fill out their ballots. 首先同學們到投票亭填寫選票。
Once that's done, they vote by putting their ballots in the ballot box. 一旦完成，他們將選票投入票櫃來投票。

title: Word of the Day: hula hooping 搖呼拉圈
desc:
彰化縣芳苑鄉路上國小
The students enjoy hula hooping during their recess. 
同學們喜歡在下課期間搖呼拉圈。
Hula hooping is a great way to get some exercise and have fun at the same time.  
搖呼拉圈是個很好的運動，同時也是很好玩的活動。

title: Word of the Day: thumb piano (n) 拇指鋼琴
desc:
彰化市彰興國中
This girl is playing a musical instrument called a thumb piano. 這位女孩正在彈奏一種拇指鋼琴的樂器。
This thumb piano is portable, meaning you can easily bring it with you wherever you go. 拇指鋼琴是可攜式的，意思就是你走到哪裡都可以帶著它。

title: Word of the Day: dance (v) 跳舞
desc:
彰化縣芳苑鄉芳苑國小
The students dance to the music. 同學們隨著音樂節奏跳舞。
The students dance together in class. 同學們在班上一起跳舞。

title: Word of the Day: dance (v) 跳舞
desc:
彰化縣埤頭鄉芙朝國小
The students dance to the music. 同學們隨著音樂節奏跳舞。
The students dance together in class. 同學們在班上一起跳舞。

title: Word of the Day: three legged race (n) 兩人三腳
desc:
彰化縣芳苑鄉路上國小
In a three-legged race, two people have to run as a team with their legs tied together. 在兩人三腳競賽中，兩個人的腳必須綁起來合力賽跑。
In this three-legged race, the students also have to practice English! 在這場兩人三角的競賽中，同學們還得練習講英語。

title: Word of the Day: recycling (n) 回收
desc:
彰化縣人師教育協會

Recycling is a way to reuse materials like paper and plastic. 資源回收是將紙類和塑膠之類的材質再次回收使用。
Recycling can help take care of the planet. 資源回收有助於照顧我們的地球。

title: Word of the Day: telescope (n) 望遠鏡
desc:
彰化縣北斗鎮北斗國中
The science teacher shows the students how to use the telescopes. 科學老師為學生示範如何使用望遠鏡。
The students practice adusting the telescopes to observe objects far away. 同學們練習調整望遠鏡來觀察遠方的物體。

title: Word of the Day: tee-ball (n) 樂樂棒球
desc:
彰化縣伸港鄉新港國小
In tee-ball, you hit the ball with a bat.   在玩樂樂棒時，你使用球棒擊球。
To score a point in tee-ball, the runner has to get to the home plate.   要在樂樂棒的比賽中得分，跑者必須到達本壘。

title: Word of the Day: spelling contest (n) 拼字比賽
desc:
彰化縣伸港鄉新港國小
In the spelling contest, the teacher reads aloud a word for students to spell. 在拼字比賽中，老師大聲讀出一個單字讓學生拼出來。
The students write the word and hold up their boards in the spelling contest. 在拼字比賽中，同學們將字寫下來並且將他們的白板舉高。

title: Word of the Day: sign language (n) 手語
desc:
彰化縣大村鄉村上國小
The volunteers are teaching the students Taiwanese sign language. 志工們正在教學生台灣的手語。
The students practice Taiwanese sign language with a song and dance. 同學們用歌曲和舞蹈來練習台灣的手語。

title: Word of the Day: recycling (n) 回收
desc:
彰化縣鹿鳴國中雙語資源網
https://luming.mycultureconnect.org/home

彰化市東芳國小
The students are mixing the ingredients together to get ready to make cookies in baking class. 在上烘焙課時，同學們將原料混合後，準備好做餅乾。
Once the ingredients are mixed together, the students put the cookies in the oven for baking. 原料混合後，同學們將餅乾放入烤箱烘焙。

title: Word of the Day: dance (n) 跳舞
desc:
彰化縣伸港鄉新港國小
The students are practicing street dance by synchronizing their moves.  同學們同時跳一樣的舞步來練習街舞。
In dance class, the students are moving to the instructions of the teachers. 在舞蹈課，同學們隨著老師的指導擺動身體。

title: Word of the Day: decorate (v) 布置
desc:
彰化縣鹿鳴國中雙語資源網
https://luming.mycultureconnect.org/
The students decorate the bulletin board for all students to see. 同學們布置布告欄讓所有人欣賞。
They tape certificates of recognition to decorate the classroom 他們將獎狀貼上去來布置教室。

title: Word of the Day: dodgeball (n) 躲避球
desc:
彰化縣鹿鳴國中雙語資源網站 http://luming.mycultureconnect.org
The students try to hit the students with the dodgeball.學生們用躲避球試著擊中學生。
The students line up to face each other for the dodgeball game.學生們排隊面對面為了躲避球比賽。

title: Word of the Day: newspaper (n) 報紙
desc:
彰化縣鹿鳴國中雙語資源網
https://luming.mycultureconnect.org/

In class, students work together to make newspapers. 在班上，同學們一起製作報紙。
Students use paint brushes and pencils to create their newspapers. 同學們用水彩筆和鉛筆來製作自己的報紙。

title: Word of the Day: pizza (n) 披薩
desc:
彰化縣北斗鎮北斗國中
Once the students are ready, they put their pizzas in the oven to cook. 當學生將披薩做好後，他們把它放入烤箱去烤。
After they take the freshly-baked pizzas out of the oven, they cut each pie into slices. 把剛烤好的披薩拿出烤箱後，他們將每一片披薩切成好幾片。

title: Word of the Day: spell (v) 拼字
desc:
彰化縣鹿鳴國中雙語資源網
https://luming.mycultureconnect.org/

The students are spelling words using letter tiles. 同學們用字母方塊拼字。
This activity helps students practice their spelling.  這個活動幫助學生練習拼字。

title: Word of the Day: Chinese yo-yo (n) 扯鈴
desc:
彰化縣花壇國中雙語資源網站 http://huatang.mycultureconnect.org
The students are learning to use the Chinese yo-yo.學生們正在學習使用扯鈴。
If you think using the Chinese yo-yo is easy, it's not.如果您認為使用扯鈴很容易，其實不然。

title: Word of the Day: wind (n) 風
desc:
彰化縣伸港鄉新港國小
In science class, students used a weather vane to check the direction of the wind. 在自然課，學生們用風向標檢查風的方向。
After using the weather vane, the students wrote the direction of the wind in their workbook. 使用風向標後，學生們在他們的作業本上寫下風的方向。

title: Word of the Day: dodgeball (n) 躲避球
desc:
彰化縣鹿鳴國中雙語資源網站 
http://luming.mycultureconnect.org

Dodgeball is a fast-paced game where the goal is to eliminate all the players from the opposing team. 躲避球是一種節奏快速的遊戲，目標是將對手隊伍的所有選手淘汰出局。
In dodgeball, you eliminate an opposing player by hitting them with the ball. 在躲避球比賽中，你用球擊中對方的選手讓他們出局。

title: Word of the Day: cultural exchange (n) 文化交流
desc:
彰化縣和美鎮和美高中
The students gathered together for a cultural exchange activity at Hemei High School. 和美高中的學生聚集做文化交流的活動。
During the cultural exchange, they took foreign visitors to a historical site. 在文化交流的活動中，他們帶著國外的來賓參觀歷史古蹟。

title: Word of the Day: dance routine (n) 舞蹈動作
desc:
彰化縣鹿港鎮鹿鳴國中
The girls work very hard, rehearsing their dance routines with their instructor. 這群女孩子很認真和老師排練他們的舞步。
Once they know the moves like the backs of their hands, the girls perform their dance routines in front of their classmates. 一旦他們將舞步練到很熟之後，他們在同學的面前表演。

title: Word of the Day: playground (n) 遊戲場
desc:
彰化縣伸港鄉新港國小
The children are jumping, sliding, and climbing at the playground. 小朋友在遊樂場上跳躍、溜滑梯和爬上爬下。
The children are enjoying playing at the playground with their friends. 小朋友喜歡和朋友在遊樂場玩耍。

title: Word of the Day: building blocks (n) 積木
desc:
彰化縣伸港鄉新港國小
The students are working together to construct a slide with building blocks. 同學們一起用積木建造一個滑梯。
The students are playing with their final construction made of building blocks. 學生們正在玩他們用積木建造的成品。

title: Word of the Day ukulele 烏克麗麗
desc:
彰化縣鹿鳴國中雙語資源網
https://luming.mycultureconnect.org/

The ukulele is a small musical instrument.  烏克麗麗是很小型的樂器。 
All the students play their ukuleles together.  同學們一起彈烏克麗麗。

title: Word of the Day: shot put (n) 鉛球
desc:
彰化縣伸港鄉新港國小
The students are practicing shot put in the field. 同學在操場上練習推鉛球。
The students are taking turns doing shot put for track and field. 同學們輪流推鉛球為田徑賽做準備。

title: Word of the Day: music teacher (n) 音樂老師
desc:
彰化縣溪州國中雙語資源網站 http://sijhoujh.mycultureconnect.org
The music teacher is teaching his students how to play a traditional Chinese instrument called the erhu. 這位音樂老師正在指導學生演奏一種名為「二胡」的傳統中國樂器。
Two foreign English teachers are also participating in the music teacher's class. 有兩位外國英文老師也在這堂音樂課當中學習。

title: Word of the Day: promote (v) 推廣
desc:
彰化縣和美鎮和美高中
On April 23, World Book Day, a day to promote books and reading, is celebrated around the world. 4月23日世界閱讀日是全世界推廣書本與閱讀的日子。
On World Book Day, the school organizes an event at the school library to promote reading. 在世界閱讀日當天，學校在圖書館辦了一個活動來推廣閱讀。

title: Word of the Day: museum (n) 博物館
desc:
彰化縣和美鎮和美高中
The school takes the students on an exciting and educational field trip to a museum. 學校帶領學生到一個博物館做戶外教學。
The museum has a variety of exhibits about Taiwanese history for visitors to enjoy. 這個博物館有很多關於台灣歷史的展覽讓遊客欣賞。

title: Word of the Day: choir (n) 合唱團
desc:
彰化縣鹿鳴國中雙語資源網站 http://luming.mycultureconnect.org
These students are performing as a choir, meaning a group of vocalists that sing together. 這些學生正在表演，他們是合唱團成員，意思是一群歌手一起唱歌。
In a choir some members have high voices and others have low voices, giving the group a very full sound when they all sing simultaneously. 合唱團當中，有些人唱高音，有些人低音，這樣同時唱的時候有個很完整的音域。

title: Word of the Day: ballot (n) 選票
desc:
彰化縣土庫國小雙語資源網站 http://tuku.mycultureconnect.org
First the students go into the voting booth to fill out their ballots. 首先同學們到投票亭填寫選票。
Once that's done, they vote by putting their ballots in the ballot box. 一旦完成，他們將選票投入票櫃來投票。

title: Word of the Day: line (n) 排
desc:
彰化縣二水鄉源泉國小
When the students arrive at school in the morning, they get in line and wait for their turn to practice English. 當學生早上到校時，他們排隊等待練習講英語。
Once they get to the front of the line, the teacher asks them to read several phrases in English. 一旦學生到了隊伍的前面時，老師要求他們唸幾個英文片語。

title: Word of the Day: drill (n) 訓練
desc:
彰化縣伸港鄉新港國小
The basketball players perform various drills to improve their skills. 籃球隊員做各種訓練來提昇他們的技巧。
The coach watches the players as they do ball-handling drills. 教練看著這些籃球員做控球的訓練。

title: Word of the Day: encourage (v) 鼓勵
desc:
彰化縣二林鎮廣興國小 
The school encourages students to read more by taking them to the library to read each week. 學校每週帶學生到圖書館以鼓勵學生多閱讀。
The school also encourages them to read by giving awards to students that finish a lot of books. 學校也藉由頒獎給讀很多書的小朋友來鼓勵他們。

title: Word of the Day: pencil sharpener (n) 削鉛筆機
desc:
彰化縣伸港鄉新港國小
A pencil sharpener is a tool for sharpening the tip of a pencil. 削鉛筆機是將筆尖削尖的工具。
Some pencil sharpeners are electric, but the ones in this classroom are powered by hand. 有些削鉛筆機是電動的，但是這個教室內的是手動的。

title: Word of the Day: attention to detail 注意細節
desc:
彰化縣伸港鄉新港國小
Calligraphy requires great attention to detail. 寫書法極需注意細節。
The calligraphy teacher has incredible attention to detail; you can tell by the way he instructs his students. 書法老師非常注意細節，你看他指導學生的方式便能看出來。

title: Word of the Day: oar (n) 槳
desc:
彰化縣和美鎮和美高中
An oar is a long pole that you can use to propel a boat through the water. 槳是一根長竿，用來讓船在水中前進。
These students are using oars to row their boats around a large indoor swimming pool. 這些學生用槳在大型室內游泳池划船。

title: Word of the Day: starting line (n) 起跑線
desc:
彰化縣伸港鄉新港國小
The teacher asks several students to line up at the starting line. 老師要求一些學生在起跑線排隊。
Once the teacher gives them the signal, they all take off running from the starting line. 當老師發號施令後，他們從起跑線開始向前跑。

title: Word of the Day: rainy day  (n) 下雨天
desc:
彰化縣二水鄉源泉國小
On rainy days, people use umbrellas to shield themselves from the rain. 下雨天時，人們用雨傘擋雨。
When you leave your house on a rainy day, don't forget to bring your umbrella! 下雨天時，當你離家時，不要忘記帶雨傘。

title: Word of the Day: rocket stove (n) 火箭爐
desc:
彰化縣北斗國中
The teacher is showing students how to start a fire in a rocket stove with wood and paper. 老師為學生示範如何用木柴和紙在火箭爐中生火。
Once the students get their fires burning, they use small pans to cook popcorn on top of the rocket stoves. 一旦學生讓火開始燃燒，他們用小平底鍋在火箭爐上面煮爆米花。

title: Word of the Day: air (n) 空氣
desc:
彰化縣溪州鄉溪州國小
Balloons expand when you fill them with air. 當你幫氣球打氣時，氣球會變大。
Once the balloons are filled with air, you can use them to make all sorts of interesting designs. 一旦氣球充滿空氣，你能做成不同有趣的造型。

title: Word of the Day: flagpole (n) 旗桿
desc:
彰化縣鹿鳴國中雙語資源網站 http://luming.mycultureconnect.org
There are four students next to the flagpole: one is holding the flag, one is holding the rope, and two are standing next to them. 
旗桿旁邊有四個同學：一個拿著旗子，一個拿著繩子，兩個站在旁邊。
One student pulls on the rope to raise the flag up the flagpole. 
一名學生拉著繩子將旗幟升到旗桿上。

title: Word of the Day: dismissal (n) 放學；解散
desc:
彰化縣伸港鄉新港國小
At dismissal the students wait outside for their parents to pick them up from school. 放學時間，學生在外面等待父母接他們回家。
You should have all your belongings with you at dismissal time. 放學時，你應該將所有個人物品都帶到。

title: Word of the Day: train (n) 火車
desc:
彰化縣太平國小雙語資源網站 http://taiping.mycultureconnect.org 
The class goes to the train station to buy tickets for the train. 這個班級到火車站買車票搭火車。
Once they have their tickets, they wait on the platform for the train to come. 一旦有車票，他們在月台等待火車到站。

title: Word of the Day: quiet (adj) 安靜的
desc:
彰化縣鹿鳴國中雙語資源網
https://luming.mycultureconnect.org/
The quiet environment in the library is conducive to reading or studying. 圖書館安靜的環境有助於閱讀或讀書。
You should keep quiet in the library so you don't disturb the other visitors. 在圖書館應該要保持安靜，才不會打擾到其他的人。

title: Word of the Day: art exhibit (n) 藝術展
desc:
彰化縣鹿鳴國中雙語資源網
https://luming.mycultureconnect.org/
An art exhibit is a place where artwork is displayed for visitors to see. 藝術展是藝術作品展示給人欣賞的地方。
This art exhibit has many incredible sculptures on display. 這個藝術展有很多

title: Word of the Day: serve (v) 打菜
desc:
彰化縣育新國小雙語資源網站 http://yushin.mycultureconnect.org
The students serve lunch to their classmates. 學生為同學打菜。
The task of serving changes every week. 打菜的工作每週輪替一次。

title: Word of the Day: creativity (n) 創造力
desc:
彰化縣鹿鳴國中雙語資源網
https://luming.mycultureconnect.org/

Art class is an ideal setting for developing your creativity. 美術課是發展創造力的理想環境。
These students are displaying their creativity by making beautiful and intricate works of art. 這些同學藉由創作美麗與精緻的藝術作品來展現他們的創造力。

title: Word of the Day: return (v) 歸還
desc:
彰化縣鹿鳴國中雙語資源網
https://luming.mycultureconnect.org/
You should return your library books on time so others can borrow them. 你應該準時歸還圖書館的書，這樣其他人才能借閱。
If you don't return your library books on time, you may have to pay a fine. 如果你沒有準時歸還圖書館的書，你可能會被罰錢。

title: Word of the Day: garden tools (n) 園藝工具
desc:
彰化縣芳苑鄉路上國小
Garden tools, such as trowels, shovels, hoes, and picks, make gardening much easier. 園藝工具，如小鏟子、鏟子｜鋤頭和尖鋤，使園藝變得更為容易。
Some garden tools are designed for loosening soil and digging into it. 有些園藝工具設計來鬆土與挖土。

title: Word of the Day: broom (n) 掃把
desc:
彰化縣伸港鄉新港國小
A broom is a common cleaning tool often used in combination with a dustpan. 掃把是常見的清掃用具，經常跟畚斗一起使用。
Brooms are used to sweep up dust and debris, leaving floors nice and clean. 掃把被用來掃灰塵或是垃圾，讓地板保持很乾淨。

title: Word of the Day: luggage (n) 行李
desc:
彰化市平和國小
The students use a cart to carry all their luggage at the airport. 同學們在機場用手推車推所有的行李。
They carry their luggage to the counter to get weighed. 他們將行李推到櫃台秤重。

title: Word of the Day: recorder (n) 直笛
desc:
彰化縣花壇鄉花壇國中
The recorder is the first musical instrument that many students learn. 直笛是很多學生學習的第一項樂器。
You can play many songs on a recorder. 你可以用直笛吹多首歌曲。

title: Word of the Day: CPR (n) 心肺復甦術
desc: 彰化縣溪州鄉溪州國中

title: Word of the Day: Heimlich maneuver (n) 哈姆立克急救法
desc:
彰化縣溪州國中雙語資源網站 http://sijhoujh.mycultureconnect.org
The students practice performing the Heimlich maneuver. 同學們練習做哈姆立克急救法。
The Heimlich maneuver is used to help someone choking. 哈姆立克急救法用來幫助噎到的人。

title: Word of the Day: event (n) 活動事件
desc:
彰化縣育新國小雙語資源網站 http://yushin.mycultureconnect.org
The school held a special event to celebrate Children’s Day. 
學校舉辦了一場特別的活動來慶祝兒童節。
At the event, performers sang, played instruments, and danced. 
在活動中，表演者唱歌、演奏樂器和跳舞。

title: Word of the Day: check in 辦理登機手續
desc:
彰化市平和國小
The Pinghe Elemantary School hockey team is checking in at the airport. 平和國小的曲棍球隊正在機場辦理登機手續。
After they check in, they will fly to the United States to compete. 在他們辦完登機手續後，就要飛到美國去比賽了。

title: Word of the Day: climbing trees 爬樹
desc:
彰化縣和美鎮和美國小
The students use special equipment to climb trees. 學生們使用特殊設備爬樹。
The instructors teach students how to climb the tree safely. 指導員教學生如何安全地爬樹。

title: Word of the Day: track (n) 徑賽；跑道
desc:
彰化縣鹿鳴國中雙語資源網
https://luming.mycultureconnect.org/
Track events usually involve running on a track that‘s shaped like an oval. 徑賽通常是在橢圓形跑道上的比賽項目。
Some track events purely involve running, while others require athletes to jump over hurdles or pass batons between teammates. 有些徑賽只是純粹賽跑，然而有些則是需要運動員跳過障礙或者是將接力棒遞給隊友。

title: Word of the Day: pancake (n) 煎餅
desc:
彰化縣鹿鳴國中
In Lukang the locals make pancakes out of wheat flour and glutinous rice flour to celebrate the Dragon Boat Festival. 在鹿港，當地人用麵粉與糯米粉製作煎餅來慶祝端午節。
The students are also preparing these special pancakes to celebrate the festival. 學生們正在準備這種特別的煎餅來慶祝這個節慶。

title: Word of the Day: ceremony (n) 典禮
desc:
彰化縣鹿鳴國中雙語資源網站 http://luming.mycultureconnect.org
Students line up in orderly rows during the flag raising ceremony. 同學們在升旗典禮時排成整齊的隊形。
During this flag raising ceremony, some students are given awards. 在升旗期間，有些同學受獎。

title: Word of the Day: Heimlich maneuver (n) 哈姆立克急救法
desc:
彰化縣鹿鳴國中雙語資源網站 http://luming.mycultureconnect.org
The students practice performing the Heimlich maneuver. 同學們練習做哈姆立克急救法。
The Heimlich maneuver is used to help someone choking. 哈姆立克急救法用來幫助噎到的人。

title: Word of the Day: conversation (n) 對話
desc:
彰化縣鹿鳴國中雙語資源網站 http://luming.mycultureconnect.org
Each student has a conversation with the teacher in English. 學生用英語與老師進行對話。
Speaking a lot is the best way to improve your conversation skills. 多說是提升談話技巧的最好方法。

title: Word of the Day: online class (n) 線上課程
desc:
彰化縣二林鎮廣興國小
College students lead an online class for elementary students. 大學生帶領小學生上線上課程。
Students practice their bilingual skills in the online class. 同學們在線上課程練習雙語的技能。

title: Word of the Day: CPR (n) 心肺復甦術
desc:
彰化縣鹿鳴國中雙語資源網站 http://luming.mycultureconnect.org
The students learn how to perform CPR. 同學們正在學習做CPR。
The students practice CPR for adults and infants. 同學練習為大人和嬰兒做CPR

title: Word of the Day: audience (n) 觀眾
desc:
彰化縣溪州鄉溪州國小
The two young storytellers present their story in front of an audience. 這兩位說書人在觀眾前講故事。
The audience is eager to participate in the activity! 這群觀眾參與活動的意願很高。

title: Word of the Day: slice (n) 片
desc:
彰化縣鹿鳴國中雙語資源網
https://luming.mycultureconnect.org/

The students use knives to cut the cake into slices. 同學們用刀子將糕餅切成幾片。
Then they put the slices of cake onto plates to serve to their classmates. 然後他們將一片一片的糕餅放在盤子給同學吃。

title: Word of the Day: clean up (v) 打掃

title: Word of the Day: worksheet (n) 學習單

In class the students get ready for their storytelling event by filling out a worksheet. 在上課中，同學們填寫學習單為他們說故事的活動做準備。

title: Word of the Day: piano (n) 鋼琴

Some perform solos, meaning they play alone, while others perform duets, which is when two pianists play the piano at the same time. 有些學生表演獨奏，這意味著單獨演奏，而另一些學生表演二重奏，即兩位鋼琴家同時彈奏鋼琴。

要保持健康的生活方式，您應該確保每晚有充足的睡眠、經常運動、健康飲食以及照顧您的心理健康。

title: Word of the Day: basketball (n) 籃球
desc:
彰化縣源泉國小
Students love to play basketball during recess. 
學生們喜歡在課間休息時打籃球。
A pick-up game is an on-the-spot game for basketball. 
鬥牛賽是籃球的當場臨時組合的比賽。

title: Word of the Day: check out (v) 借書
desc:
彰化縣花壇國中雙語網站
Students can check out books from the school library to read during their free time.學生可以在空閒時間從學校圖書館借書閱讀。
To check out, students need to present their library card and books to the librarian.學生需要向圖書管理員出示借書證和想借閱的書籍才能借書。

title: Word of the Day: butterfly (n) 蝴蝶
desc:
彰化縣螺陽國小雙語網站 http://luoyang.mycultureconnect.org
Butterflies are colorful insects. 蝴蝶是五顏六色的昆蟲。
Students enjoy visiting the butterfly garden. 同學們很喜歡參觀蝴蝶園。

title: Word of the Day: gather (v) 聚集
desc:
彰化縣螺陽國小雙語網站 http://luoyang.mycultureconnect.org
In the morning, the students gather in the courtyard. 同學們在早上時在校園內集合。
After they gather, the teacher gives announcements. 在他們集合之後，老師宣布重要訊息。

title: Word of the Day: scarecrow (n) 稻草人
desc:
彰化縣芙朝國小雙語網站
The students are making a scarecrow. 學生們正在做稻草人。
To make a scarecrow, you need poles, straw, and old clothes. 做稻草人你需要竹竿、稻草與舊衣服。

title: Word of the Day: social studies (n) 社會科
desc:
彰化縣明禮國小雙語網站 http://mingli.mycultureconnect.org
The students are in social studies class. 同學們正在上社會課。
The teacher teaches about religions in social studies class. 老師在社會課教導學生有關宗教的知識。

title: Word of the Day egg hunt 尋找彩蛋
desc:
彰化縣二水國小 http://ershuei.mycultureconnect.org
An egg hunt is a popular activity for kids on Easter day. 在復活節當天，尋找彩蛋是很受小朋友歡迎的活動。
After the egg hunt, students exchange their eggs for prizes. 在尋找彩蛋後，同學們用找到的蛋來換獎品。

title: Word of the Day: magnetic force (n) 磁力
desc:
彰化縣花壇鄉花壇國中
The students are doing an experiment to learn more about magnetic force. 學生們正在做一個實驗，以進一步了解磁力。
The teacher shows his students how to move steel balls with magnetic force. 
老師向學生展示如何用磁力移動鋼珠。

title: Word of the Day: workbook (n) 習作本
desc:
彰化縣芙朝國小雙語網站 http://fuchao.mycultureconnect.org
The students are writing in their workbooks.學生們正在寫習作。
The teacher is checking the students' workbooks.老師正在改學生的習作。

title: Word of the Day: draw (v) 畫
desc:
彰化縣芳苑鄉路上國小
The students use markers to draw fish on the whiteboard. 同學們用白板筆在白板上面畫魚。
Drawing on the whiteboard is a lot of fun during recess. 下課期間在白板上面畫畫很有趣。

title: Word of the Day: string instrument (n) 弦樂器
desc:
彰化縣鹿港鎮鹿鳴國中 
String instruments are any musical instruments that are played with a bow. 弦樂器是用弓演奏的任何樂器。
Some examples of string instuments are the cello and the violin. 弦樂器的一些例子是大提琴和小提琴。

title: Word of the Day: rice dumpling (n) 粽子
desc:
彰化縣花壇國中
Rice dumplings are a traditional food made from rice wrapped in bamboo leaves. 粽子是傳統食物，由米做成，用竹葉包住。
The teacher is showing different types of rice dumplings from around the world. 這位老師展示世界各地不同種類的粽子。

title: Word of the Day: dribble (v) 運球
desc:
彰化縣僑義國小雙語網站 http://chiaoyi.mycultureconnect.org
The teacher is showing how to dribble the ball in PE class. 
老師在體育課上演示如何運球。
The students practice dribbling using both their left and right hands. 
學生們用左右手練習運球。

title: Word of the Day: dance (v) 跳舞
desc:
彰化縣大村鄉村上國小
The students dance to the music.學生們隨著音樂起舞。
The students dance together in class.學生們在課堂上一起跳舞。

title: Word of the Day: robot (n) 機器人
desc:
彰化縣彰化市彰興國中
The students are building robots. 
學生們正在製作機器人。
The students program their robots to perform a task. 
學生們將他們的機器人進行編程以執行一項任務。

title: Word of the Day: dance (n) 舞蹈
desc:
彰化縣花壇鄉花壇國中
The students put on a dance performance by the school gate. 
學生們在校門口進行了舞蹈表演。
They perform a dance routine with colorful pom-poms. 
他們用五顏六色的彩球表演舞蹈。

title: Word of the Day: building blocks (n) 積木
desc:
彰化縣溪州國小
The students are playing with building blocks.學生們正在玩積木。
Students are following instructions for the building blocks.學生按照積木的說明進行操作。

title: Word of the Day: fitness test (n) 體適能測驗
desc:
彰化縣芳苑鄉路上國小
The students are practicing for their fitness test. 同學們為體適能測驗做練習。
A fitness test may include sit-ups and stretches. 體適能測驗可能包括仰臥起坐與伸展的運動。

title: Word of the Day: watercolor (n) 水彩
desc:
彰化縣竹塘鄉土庫國小 
In art class, the students are painting with watercolor. 美術課中，同學們正在用水彩畫畫。
To use watercolor, you need a brush, a palette and water. 用水彩作畫需要畫筆、調色板還有水。

title: Word of the Day: newspaper (n) 報紙
desc:
彰化縣僑義國小雙語網站 http://chiaoyi.mycultureconnect.org
These students are reading newspapers. 
這些學生正在看報紙。
Newspapers give you news, sports, weather, and other information. 
報紙為您提供新聞、體育、天氣和其他訊息。

title: Word of the Day: robot (n) 機器人
desc:
彰化縣和美鎮和美高中
The students are learning how to make a robot and how to control it. 同學們正在學習如何製作與控制機器人。
Robots can be used as toys and in manufacturing. 機器人可以作為玩具，也可以運用在製造業。

title: Word of the Day: swimming class (n) 游泳課
desc:
彰化縣溪州國小
The students learn to swim in swimming class. 學生在游泳課學習如何游泳。
The students use the pool in swimming class. 學生在游泳課時使用游泳池。

title: Word of the Day: cooking class (n) 烹飪課
desc:
彰化縣花壇國中雙語網站 http://huatang.mycultureconnect.org
These students are learning how to prepare food in a cooking class. 這些學生在烹飪課學習如何準備食材。
The students are chopping and stir-frying vegetables in a cooking class. 這些學生在烹飪課中切菜與炒菜。

title: Word of the Day: fertilizer (n) 肥料
desc:
彰化縣大村鄉村東國小
The teacher is putting fertilizer on the garden spot. 
老師正在給園地施肥。
Fertilizer helps plants to grow; it is food for plants. 
肥料幫助植物生長；它是植物的食物。

title: Word of the Day: plucker string instrument (n) 彈撥
desc:
彰化縣鹿鳴國中雙語網站 http://luming.mycultureconnect.org
A plucked string instrument is played by using your fingers to move a string. 彈撥弦樂器是透過用手指移動琴弦來演奏的。
Some examples of plucked string instruments are the guitar, the pipa and the ruan. 
彈撥樂器的一些例子是吉他、琵琶和阮。

title: Word of the Day: insect (n) 昆蟲
desc:
彰化縣埔心鄉太平國小
The students are studying insects. 這些學生正在研究昆蟲。
The teacher is showing different types of insects.  這位老師展示不同種類的昆蟲。

title: Word of the Day: Mother's Day card (n) 母親節卡
desc:
彰化縣土庫國小雙語網站 http://tuku.mycultureconnect.org
These students are making Mother's Day cards for their mothers. 這些學生正在為他們的媽媽做母親節卡片。
They draw pictures and put a message on their Mother's Day cards. 他們在卡片上畫圖並寫字。

title: Word of the Day: math (n) 數學
desc:
彰化縣竹塘鄉土庫國小
The students are solving math problems. 學生們正在解決數學問題。
The students are working on their math workbooks. 學生們正在做他們的數學作業本。

title: Word of the Day: perler bead (n) 拼豆
desc:
彰化縣大村鄉村東國小
These students are using perler beads. 這些學生正在使用拼豆。
With perler beads, you can spell words or make shapes. 拚豆可以用來拼字或者是製作形狀。

title: Word of the Day Mother's Day card 母親節卡
desc:
彰化縣芳苑鄉路上國小
These students are making Mother's Day cards for their mothers. 這些學生正在為他們的媽媽做母親節卡片。
They draw pictures and put a message on their Mother's Day cards. 他們在卡片上畫圖並寫字。

title: Word of the Day: crosswalk (n) 斑馬線
desc:
彰化縣和美國小
A crosswalk is where you can safely cross the street. 斑馬線是可以安全過馬路的地方。
Pedestrians have the right of way in a crosswalk. 在斑馬線上，行人有路權。

title: Word of the Day: sing (v) 唱
desc:
彰化縣花壇國中雙語網站 http://huatang.mycultureconnect.org
The students are reading their lyrics in a singing class. 這些學生在歌唱課中看歌詞。
Singing means to practice your voice control. 唱歌是練習如何控制你的聲音。

title: Word of the Day: wind instrument (n) 管樂器
desc:
彰化縣鹿鳴國中雙語網站 http://luming.mycultureconnect.org
Wind instruments are any musical instruments that you blow into to play. 管樂器是您吹奏的任何樂器。
Some examples of wind instruments are the bamboo flute, the sheng, and the suona.  管樂器的一些例子是竹笛、笙和嗩吶。

title: Word of the Day: harmonica (n) 口琴
desc:
彰化縣芳苑國小
The teacher is teaching the students to play the harmonica. 這位老師正在教導學生吹口琴。
The harmonica is a musical instrument that you blow into to play. 口琴是吹氣的樂器。

title: Word of the Day: beach (n) 海灘
desc:
彰化縣芳苑國小
The students are doing beach cleanup. 學生們正在淨灘。
They pick up the trash to clean the beach. 他們撿拾垃圾讓海灘變乾淨。

title: Word of the Day: set plant (n) 植栽
desc:
彰化縣大村鄉村東國小
The students are planting set plants.  學生們正在種植栽。
Set plants are young plants. 植栽是幼苗。

title: Word of the Day: water  (v) 澆水
desc:
彰化縣大村鄉村東國小
The students are watering the new plants.
學生們正在給新植物澆水。
They are using a sprinkler can to water their plants.
他們正在使用灑水壺給植物澆水。

title: Word of the Day: cross (v) 過馬路
desc:
彰化縣太平國小雙語網站 http://taiping.mycultureconnect.org
Watch out for students crossing the road. 
當心正在過馬路的學生。
Crossing guards stop traffic to let students cross the street safely. 交通導護阻擋車輛讓學生安全過馬路。

title: Word of the Day: experiment (n) 實驗
desc:
彰化市彰興國中
The students are conducting an experiment. 學生們正在進行一項實驗。
The experiment uses equipment to look at light. 這實驗使用儀器設備來觀察光線。

title: Word of the Day: interview (n) 面試
desc:
彰化縣和美鎮和美高中
These students are using a mock interview as practice for a real interview. 這些學生正在使用模擬面試作為真實面試的練習。
Interviews establish a first impression for college admission or for future employers. 
面試為大學錄取或未來的雇主建立第一印象。

title: Word of the Day: storyteller (n) 講故事的人
desc:
彰化縣埔心鄉太平國小
A good storyteller teaches a lesson and entertains you at the same time. 
一個擅長講故事的人可以教導大家道理，同時又兼具娛樂大眾。
The storytellers can use real or fictional information to tell a story. 
講故事的人可能用真實或者是虛構的情節來說故事。

title: Word of the Day: garden trowel (n) 小鏟子
desc:
彰化縣大村鄉村東國小
The students are using a garden trowel. 學生們正在使用小鏟子。
A garden trowel is used to loosen dirt and plant seeds. 小鏟子用於疏鬆泥土和播種。

title: Word of the day: percussion (n) 打擊樂
desc:
彰化縣鹿鳴國中雙語資源網
http://luming.mycultureconnect.org/
Percussion means you must strike or hit something to make a sound.打擊樂意味著你必須敲或打某物才能發出聲音。
Many musical instruments are percussion instruments such as the drums, the xylophone, and the yangqin. 很多樂器是打擊樂器，例如鼓、木琴、揚琴等。

title: Word of the Day: test paper (n) 考卷
desc:
彰化縣北斗鎮螺青國小雙語資源網
http://luoqing.mycultureconnect.org
Take one test paper and pass the rest back. 拿一張考卷，其餘的往後傳。
Students in the back, please stand up and collect the test papers from your line. 最後一排學生請起立，幫忙收你那一排的考卷。

title: Word of the Day: martial arts (n) 武術
desc:
彰化縣太平國小雙語網站 http://taiping.mycultureconnect.org
The teacher leads the students in their martial arts lesson. 老師在武術課中帶領學生做動作。
The students practice different martial arts moves. 學生們練習不同武術的招式。

title: Word of the Day: ocarina (n) 陶笛
desc:
彰化縣路上國小
These students are playing the ocarina.這些學生正在吹陶笛。
The ocarina is a musical wind instrument.陶笛是一種管樂器。

title: Word of the day: memorize(v) 背誦
desc:
彰化縣芳苑鄉路上國小
The students are taught to memorize a classic.學生們被教導要背誦經典。
The older students check them to see if they can memorize it.年長的學生檢查他們是否能記住它。

title: Word of the Day: protective gear(n) 護具
desc:
彰化縣僑義國小雙語資源網
https://chiaoyi.mycultureconnect.org/
The teacher is showing his students how to put on protective gear. 老師正在教他的學生如何穿上防護裝備。
This type of protective gear is used in kendo class.這種護具用於劍道課程。

title: Word of the Day: greenhouse (n) 溫室
desc:
彰化縣竹塘鄉土庫國小
The students are visiting a greenhouse. 學生們正在參觀溫室。
A greenhouse is used to grow plants without the use of chemicals. 溫室用於在不使用農藥的情況下種植植物。

title: Word of the Day read aloud competition 朗讀比賽
desc:
彰化縣太平國小雙語網站 http://taiping.mycultureconnect.org
The students practice for their read-aloud competition. 學生為朗讀比賽練習。
The teacher helps the students prepare for their read-aloud competition. 老師協助學生們準備他們的朗讀比賽。

title: Word of the Day: paint (v) 畫
desc:
彰化縣太平國小雙語網站 http://taiping.mycultureconnect.org
The students paint the lion face on the lantern. 學生們在燈籠上畫獅子的臉。
The students use different colors to paint. 學生們用不同的顏色的畫。

title: Word of the Day: pickup game (n) 籃球鬥牛賽
desc:
彰化縣太平國小雙語網站 http://taiping.mycultureconnect.org
The students are playing a pickup game of basketball. 學生們正在打籃球鬥牛賽。
A pickup game is an unofficial game played for fun. 鬥牛賽是非正式、純好玩的一種比賽。

title: Word of the Day: eraser (n) 板擦
desc:
彰化縣太平國小雙語網站 http://taiping.mycultureconnect.org
The students are cleaning the board with an eraser. 學生們正在用板擦擦黑板。
They then clean the eraser with a cleaning machine. 然後他們用板擦機清潔板擦。

title: Word of the Day: balloon (n) 氣球
desc:
彰化縣和美鎮和美國小
The artist makes cute characters out of balloons.
藝術家用氣球製作可愛的角色。
The balloons are all different and beautiful colors. 
氣球都是不同的以及美麗的顏色。

title: Word of the Day: volleyball (n) 排球
desc:
彰化縣北斗國中
The students are playing volleyball. 學生們正在打排球。
In volleyball, the teams hit the ball over the net. 打排球時，兩隊將球擊打過網子。

title: Word of the Day: tennis (n) 網球
desc:
彰化縣二水國小 http://ershuei.mycultureconnect.org
The students are playing tennis on the tennis court. 
學生們正在網球場上打網球。
Tennis is played with a ball and a racket. 
打網球要用球和球拍。

title: Word of the Day: frisbee (n) 飛盤
desc:
彰化縣溪州國小
The students are playing frisbee.學生們正在玩飛盤。
Frisbee can be played for fun and there are also frisbee competitions. 可以玩飛盤，還有飛盤比賽。

title: Word of the Day: shoot hoops (n) 投籃
desc:
彰化縣太平國小雙語網站 http://taiping.mycultureconnect.org
Shooting hoops is slang for playing basketball. 
投籃是打籃球的俚語。
Shooting hoops is just shooting baskets for fun. 
投籃只是為了好玩而投籃。

title: Word of the Day: ball control (n) 控球
desc:
彰化縣太平國小雙語網站 http://taiping.mycultureconnect.org
This student is practicing his ball control. 這位學生正在練習控球。
In a basketball game, ball control is very important. 在籃球賽中，控球是非常重要的。

title: Word of the Day: rollerblade (v) 溜直排輪
desc:
彰化縣太平國小雙語網站 http://taiping.mycultureconnect.org
These students are practicing to rollerblade. 這些學生正在練習溜直排輪。
Rollerblading can be for fun and also for exercise. 溜直排輪可以純粹是為了好玩，也可以作為運動。

title: Word of the Day (math): times (prep) 乘
desc:
彰化縣明禮國小雙語資源網
https://mingli.mycultureconnect.org/
Times is repeated addition. 乘是重複的加法。
Two times three equals six. 2Ｘ3=6

title: Word of the Day: stretch (v) 伸展
desc:
彰化縣太平國小雙語網站 http://taiping.mycultureconnect.org
The students are doing their stretching exercise. 學生們正在做伸展運動。
Stretching helps muscles and joints stay healthy. 拉伸有助於肌肉和關節保持健康。

title: Word of the Day (math): minus (prep) 減
desc:
彰化縣明禮國小雙語資源網
https://mingli.mycultureconnect.org/
Minus means to take away. 減的意思是將數字減去。 
Five minus three equals two. 5-3=2

title: Word of the day: silkworm (n) 蠶
desc:
彰化縣太平國小雙語網站 http://taiping.mycultureconnect.org
These students are studying silkworms. 這些學生正在研究蠶。
Silkworms eat mulberry leaves to make silk. 蠶吃桑葉吐絲。

title: Word of the Day: playground (n) 遊樂場
desc:
彰化縣太平國小雙語網站 http://taiping.mycultureconnect.org
These students are enjoying using the playground equipment.這些學生正在享受使用遊樂場設備的樂趣。
Playground equipment includes swings, slides, monkey bars, and climbing pipes.遊樂場設備包括鞦韆、滑梯、單槓和攀爬管。

title: Word of the Day: ocarina (n) 陶笛
desc:
彰化縣太平國小雙語網站 http://taiping.mycultureconnect.org
These students are playing the ocarina.這些學生正在吹陶笛。
The ocarina is a musical wind instrument.陶笛是一種管樂器。

title: Word of the Day: rake (n) 耙
desc:
彰化縣彰興國中
These students are raking the grass. 這些學生正在耙草。
Raking the grass helps it to grow better. 耙草可以讓草長得更好。

title: Word of the Day: salad (n) 沙拉
